title: Baked Chicken and Rice w/Mushrooms

ingredients.item: pkg. Uncle Ben's long-grain or wild rice
skinless thighs or legs or breasts

steps: Heat oven to 325 degrees.

Spread rice in roasting pan; reserve seasoning packet. Top rice with chicken. Sprinkle with dry soup mix and mushrooms. Spoon condensed soup over rice and chicken. Sprinkle herbs from rice mix over all. Pour water over ingredients. Cover.
Bake 2-2 1/2 hours. Don't open or stir until cooking is over.

title: Baked Chicken Thighs
steps: Melt butter and add mustard.
Combine bread crumbs, parsley, cheese, salt and pepper.
Dip chicken in butter mixture, roll in bread crumbs, place in greased 9 x 13 baking pan. Drizzle with remaining butter. Bake at 400 degrees for about 45 minutes.

title: Brine Chicken
steps: Rinse chicken under cold, running water and blot dry with paper towels. Arrange in a noncreative baking dish.

Make the brine: Place the salt, brown sugar, peppercorns, chili pepper and bay leaves in a large, noncreative bowl, Add the hot water, then whisk until the salt and brown sugar dissolve; stir in cold water. Let brine come to room temperature. Pour over the chicken and stir in the lemon slices, onion and garlic. Cover the dish with plastic wrap and let stand in the refrigerator for 2 hours, turning the chicken once or twice.

Preheat the grill until coals are hot. When ready to cook, brush and oil the grate. Arrange the breasts on the hot grate, all facing the same direction, at a 45 degree angle to the bars of the grate. Cook the chicken over high heat, 4 to 6 minutes per side, rotating the breasts 90 degrees after 2 minutes on each side to create an attractive crosshatch of grill marks. (To test for doneness, remove a breast from grill and poke the thickest part with your finger. It should feel firm to the touch. Transfer the chicken to a decorative platter and serve.

title: Cafe Italiano Chicken Piccata

ingredients.item: Mixture of flour and cayenne pepper for dredging

steps: Dredge chicken in flour mixture. Place in a saute pan with 4 tablespoons of butter. Brown chicken on both sides. Add 2 more tablespoons of butter, if needed. Make sure chicken is cooked through or finish in oven. When nicely browned, set aside and keep warm.

Scrape saute pan well to loosen any brown bits. Add lemon juice, broth, white wine, grated lemon rind and parsley to pan. Add up to 2 more tablespoons of butter is needed. Add capers. Cook stirring until reduced in volume to desired consistency.
Place chicken over warm pasta. Cover with sauce.

title: Chicken Breasts Diane

ingredients.item: chopped fresh chives or green onions

steps: Place chicken breast halves between sheets of plastic wrap. Pound slightly with mallet. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Heat 1 tbs each of oil and butter in a large skillet.
Cook chicken over high heat for 4 minutes on each side. Do not cook longer or they ill be overcooked and dry. Transfer to warm serving platter.
Add chives or green onion, lime juice, parsley and mustard to pan. Cook 15 seconds, whisking constantly.
Whisk in broth. Stir until sauce is smooth. Whisk in remaining butter. Serve immediately.

title: Chicken Breasts Mornay
steps: Sprinkle the chicken pieces with salt and pepper.

Melt one tablespoon butter in a heavy skillet. When it is very hot, add the chicken and cook until lightly golden on both sides, about 2 minutes to a side. Sprinkle the mushroom over and around the chicken pieces. Cover and cook about five minutes. Do not overcook or the chicken will become dry.
Transfer the chicken pieces to a baking dish. Using a slotted spoon, remove the mushrooms and arrange them over the chicken pieces. Let the cooking liquid remain in the skillet.
Meanwhile, melt the remaining butte in a saucepan and add the flour, stirring with a wire whisk. When blended and smooth, add the milk and cook, stirring until the mixture is thickened.
Spoon the sauce into the skillet and bring to a boil and add the salt and pepper to taste and cayenne pepper. Let simmer about five minutes.

Remove the sauce from the heat and add the egg yolk, stirring rapidly with a wire whisk. Add the grated Swiss and stir until melted. Add any drippings that may have accumulated around the chicken and mushrooms. Stir.
Preheat oven to 400 degrees.

Spoon the sauce over the chicken smoothing it over neatly. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese. Place the dish in the oven and bake about 10 minutes or until the chicken is piping hot and the sauce bubbling.
Run the dish under the broiler until mixture is nicely browned.
Serve with buttered noodles and salad. Serves 4.

title: Chicken Cacciatore

ingredients.item: chicken breast halves skinned w/or/wo bones
green bell pepper cut into rings
dry red wine or chicken broth

steps: BROWN chicken in hot oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat 5 minutes on each side. Remove chicken, reserve drippings in pan. Add bell pepper and onion to hot drippings and saute until tender.
RETURN chicken to pan; add garlic and next 5 ingedients. Bring to a boil; cover, reduce heat, and simmer 45 minutes. Discard bay leaf. Serveover spaghetti.

title: Chicken Cacciatore
steps: Season chicken with salt and pepper. Mix oregano to flour, roll chicken in flour. Fry in oil until done. Add garlic while chicken is frying. Skin up on chicken. When chicken is done add wine, vegetables, mushroom, Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco, little salt and pepper and tomato sauce. Cover and cook about 15 minutes on low heat. Serve over spaghetti

title: Chicken Cordon Bleu
steps: Pound/flatten chicken to 1/4 inch. place 1 slice ham and cheese in center add a little parsley. Roll up lengthwise and secure with toothpick. Add spices to breadcrumbs. Dip chicken in milk, roll in crumbs. Place chicken in baking dish cook uncovered at 350 degrees for about 30 minutes.

title: Chicken Cordon Bleu
steps: Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Coat baking sheet with olive oil or cooking spray.
Pound chicken pieces, put one slice of ham and cheese on each breast

Roll each breast jellyroll style tucking ends in and securing with toothpicks. Place flour, mustard and crumbs in separate shallow bowls, add chicken to flour and coat, then to mustard to coat and then place in bread crumbs and coat well.
Add to baking sheet and coat with cooking spry. Bake until chicken is golden and cooked through about 40 minutes, remove toothpicks and serve.

title: Chicken in Foil
steps: Rub the chicken breasts with the salt and pepper. Melt the butter in a saucepan. Add the chicken breasts and brown on all sides. Cut out four double thicknesses of aluminum foil large enough to enclose the chicken breasts completely, and place on breast on each piece of foil. Stir the flour into the butter remaining in the pan to form a smooth paste. Gradually add the chicken stock, stirring constantly. Bring to the boil, then simmer for 2 minutes. Stir in the cayenne and mushrooms. Simmer the sauce for 10 to 15 minutes, or until it is very thick and smooth. Spoon sauce over the four chicken breasts, then wrap up the foil to make parcels. Put the parcels on a baking sheet and put into the oven preheated to fairly hot (400 degrees). Bake for 40 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.

title: Chicken in Wine in No Time
source_file: Chicken/CHICKEN IN WINE in no time.htm
steps: Put flour, salt, pepper in paper bag, add chicken and shake to coat, place in fry pan in oil and brown well. Sprinkle with onion soup, pour in wine. Add a little water, cover and simmer until tender, about 45 minutes.

title: Chicken of the Islands Tangy
steps: Put vinegar, soy sauce, garlic, pepper in skillet, add chicken, let marinate for 30 minutes, turn once or twice. Heat to boil on top of stove. Cover, lower heat to simmer about 40 minutes. Marinade will be absorbed.

title: Chicken Parmesan
steps: Combine crumbs and parmesan. Dip chicken in egg and coat with crumbs. Cook chicken in skillet 3 minutes on each side til brown. Arrange pepper oven chicken. Combine remaining ingredients pour over chicken reduce heat to 220 degrees cook for 20-25 min. till tender. sprinkle with mozzarella til cheese melts.

title: Chicken Pot Pie w/Stars
steps: Heat oven to 425 degrees. Using star-shaped cookie cuter, cut pie crust into 8 large stars and 4 smaller stars. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake until golden brown, 9-11 minutes. Remove from oven; set aside.
Heat oil over medium heat in a deep 12-inch nonstick skillet. Add onion. Raise heat to medium-high. Add mushrooms to skillet.
Cut chicken into bit size pieces. Add to skillet. Cook until chicken is no longer pink outside, about 4 minutes. Add garlic and Worcestershire.

Reduce heat to medium. Add soups and milk. Mixture should;d be loose but not soupy. Add corn, peas and carrots and cheese. Cook until vegetables are heated through and cheese melts, about 2 minutes. Spoon into shallow bowl or plates, topping each with several crust star cutouts.

title: Chicken Romance

ingredients.item: frozen boneless skinless breasts or 8 tenderloins
French garlic and herb Cream cheese (Boursin)

steps: Prepare oven to 350 degrees. Lightly grease a 9-10 inch square baking dish. Place frozen chicken in baking dish, season with salt and pepper and arrange broccoli evenly over top.

In a small saucepan over low heat, combine cream cheese and milk, cook until smooth and creamy, stirring frequently. Pour the cream cheese mixture over broccoli; arrange ham slices evenly over top. Pour on remaining cream cheese mixture; sprinkle with bread crumbs and Parmesan. Cover and bake 40 minutes. Uncover and continue baking 20 minutes longer, or until chicken is cooked through and topping is golden brown. Serves 4

title: Chicken Salad
steps: In a large bowl, combine the first five ingredients. Fold in rice, celery, green pepper, onion, pineapple, water chestnuts and cheese. Add almonds just before serving if desired. Serve on cantaloupe halves or wedges if desired, or use as a sandwich spread.

title: Chicken with Potato Crust
steps: Peel potato and shred thru grater to look like potato sticks. Transfer potato t bowl with ice water to soak for 5 min. Wash and dry chicken. Mix garlic, mustard, thyme in small bowl. Spread mixture evenly on top of each chicken breast. Fold thin end of breasts under to prevent over cooking., Coat baking dish with non stick spray. Arrange chicken mustard side up. Drain potaoes and blot dry. Mix potato with oil, salt and pepper, spread each breast with about 1/2 cup. Bake 30-35 minutes on upper rack. If it is not rown.Broil 3 minutes. Sprinkle with parsley or onions.

title: Corn Flake Chicken
steps: Combine first 4 ingredients in a shallow dish. Dip breast in milk, roll on crumb mixture, place on a lightly greased baking dish. Bake at 375 degrees for about 18 minutes.

title: Country French Chicken Breasts

ingredients.item: Lipton Onion soup mix w/Garlic and Herbs

steps: In 12-inch skillets, melt butter over medium high heat anbd brown chicken. Stir in savory herb sauce with garlic soup mix blended with waater and lemon juice; arrange lemon slices on chicken. Reduce heat to low and simmoer covered 10 minutes or until sauce ois slightly thickened and chicken is done. To serve, arrange chicken over rice and spoon sauce over chicken. Makes about 4 servings.

title: Creamy Chicken and Vegetables

ingredients.item: 10 3/4 oz. Low Fat Cr of Mushroom Soup

steps: Sprinkle chicken with garlic powder.
Spray skillet with vegetable cooking spray and heat over medium-high heat 1 minute. Cook chicken 10 min. or until browned. Set chicken aside.
Add soup, milk, lemon juice, basil and vegetables. Heat to boil. Return chicken to pan. Cover and cook over low heat 10 min. or until chicken is done. serves 4

title: Crispy Chicken
steps: Put cereal ion bag roll until they are crumbs, put in bowl, eggbeaters in another bowl. Dip chicken from one bowl to the other. Bake 375 degrees for 45 minutes. You can use egg whites only, and add some Italian seasoning for a Change.

title: Crispy Chicken w/Potato Crust

ingredients.item: finely chopped fresh parsley or green onions

steps: Preheat oven to 425 degrees.
Shred the potato through the largest holes of a cheese grater.
Transfer shredded potato to a bowl of ice water and soak 5 minutes.

While potato is soaking, wash chicken and pat dry. Mix mustard, garlic and thyme in a small bawl. Using a spatula or a spoon, spread the mixture evenly on the top side of each chicken breast half. Fold the thin end of the breasts under to prevent them from overcooking.
Coat a baking dish with non-stick cooking spray. Arrange chicken, mustard-side up in the dish.

Drain the potato. Blot dry with paper towels. In a large bowl, mix potato, olive oil, pepper and salt. Spread each chicken breast with about about a 1/2 cup of the potato mixture forming an even crust.
Bake 30 to 35 minutes, on an upper rack in the oven
Chicken should be firm to the touch and the potato should be golden. (If potatoes do not brown, broil about 3 minutes under the oven broiler)
Sprinkle with parsley or chopped green onions. Serve hot with steamed carrots or broccoli. Serves 4

title: Crock Pot Chicken or Pork Chops
source_file: Chicken/Chicken/Crock Pot Chicken or Pork Chops.htm
steps: Put chicken in pot (frozen or thawed) pour 1 can chicken broth over them. Mix 1/2 cup water, cram soup and stuffing mix. Spoon over chicken.

title: Crock Pot Chicken, Cheese & Potatoes
steps: Mix soups and milk together. Slice potatoes thinly. Put 1/4 mixture in bottom of crock pot and layer potatoes. Put another 1/4 mixture on top of potatoes. Sprinkle chicken with garlic powder and place on top. Put remaining soup on top of chicken.
Cook 6-7 hours on low. OR High 3-4 hours.

title: Dijon Chicken
steps: Mix mustard with milk in a bowl.
Mix grated cheese with crumbs.
Dip chicken pieces in mustard mix then crumb mix. Spray cookie sheet with cooking spray. Bake at 400 degrees for 15-20 minutes.

title: Honey Glazed Chicken Wings
steps: Make sauce with honey and spices. Marinate wings in sauce in a baking dish in refrigerator for hour or more, turning now and then. Lightly grease cookie sheet and place wings on and bake at 375 degrees for 45 minutes turning to brown all over.

title: Honey Mustard Chicken
steps: Stir salad dressing, mustard and honey. Place chicken on grill or rack of broiler pan. Brush with 1/2 os sauce. Grill or broil for 8 to 10 minutes, turn and brush remaining sauce. Continue grilling or broiling 8 to 10 minutes or until tender. Makes 4 servings.

title: Honey-Orange Cornish Hens

ingredients.item: orange cut into 6 sections with peel

steps: Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
Make laze by combining first 7 ingredients. set aside.
If desired, season cavity of each bird with salt and pepper.
Place a garlic clove and an orange section in each cavity.
Set hens on a rack or in a roasting pan.
Baste birds well with glaze and bake 15 minutes.
Baste again and reduce heat to 350 degrees. Cook approximately 35 minutes longer, basting frequently. (Larger hens take slightly longer).

title: Low Fat Chicken Enchiladas

ingredients.item: fat free cream of chicken soup
4 oz reduced fat shredded cheddar cheese

steps: Remove tortillas from refrigerator. Heat oven to 350 degrees. Melt margarine in skillet. Cook onion and garlic until tender. Stir in chili's, sour cream and soup, mix well. Reserve 3/4 sauce, set aside. Stir in chicken and 1/2 cheese to sauce in skillet. Warm tortillas according to package directions. Fill tortillas with chicken mix. Roll up, place seam side down in greased 13 x 9 baking dish. In a small bowl combine reserved sauce and milk, spoon over tortillas and top with remaining cheese. Bake 30-35 minutes until bubbly. Make 8-10 enchiladas.

title: Nana's Portuguese Roast Chicken & Potatoes
steps: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Pour water into roasting pan. Add vinegar to taste. The water should have just a hint of vinegary taste. Sprinkle paprika over the water and mix, removing the lumps. Add salt, pepper, onion, tomato, parsley and potatoes. Before cooking add chorizo. Bake for 2 hours. Do not cover potatoes because they will steam and not roast. The potatoes will have a nice red color when they are done.

title: No Fry Fried Chicken
steps: Soak chicken in ice water. Then dip in yogurt mixed with Brown mustard. Roll in a mixture of bread crumbs and flour. Spray with Pam then bake at 400 degrees for 40 minutes or until cooked through. Turning for even browning

title: Parmesan Chicken
steps: In a bowl, combine the bread crumbs, 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese, 1 teaspoon oregano, basil, salt and pepper. In a bowl, combine the egg and water. Dip chicken in egg mixture, then coat with crumb mixture. In a skillet, cook chicken in butter on both sides until juices run clear. Meanwhile, combine the spaghetti sauce, garlic salt and remaining oregano in saucepan; heat through. Spoon over chicken; sprinkle with mozzarella and remaining Parmesan. Serve with pasta.

title: Pina Colada Chicken
steps: Drain pineapples, save juice, set pineapple aside. Combine juice and next 5 ingredients. Place chicken in baking dish 12 x 8 x 2 lightly greased. Pour juice mixture over chicken, marinate 1 hour. Bake uncovered 400 degrees for 30 minutes, reduce heat to 350 for 20 minutes, top with slices of pineapples and cherries. Bake 5 minutes more.

title: Potato Chip Sticks Spicy
steps: Preheat over to 375 degrees. Place garlic, oil and hot pepper sauce in food processor or blender, process until smooth and pour into bowl. Place crushed potato chips in another bowl. Dip chicken in garlic mixture, then in chips. Place in a single layer on a shallow baking pan. Drizzle remaining garlic mixture over chicken and sprinkle on remaining chips. Bake 15 to 20 minutes or until brown and crispy. Serve with Mustard sauce.
Mixed Mustard Sauce: Combine mustards, honey and cream in small bowl. Whisk in Miracle Whip Salad Dressing until smooth.

title: Savory Baked Chicken
steps: Combine salad dressing, juice and seasonings, mix well. Pour over chicken; chill several hours or overnight. Reserve salad dressing mixture; place chicken, skin side up on rack in baking pan. Bake at 425 degrees for 40 minutes, brushing occasionally with extra dressing.

title: Sorrento Chicken Squisito

ingredients.item: salt, pepper, onion powder and garlic powder

steps: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Season chicken with powders, salt and pepper. Heat over medium high heat in an oven safe pan. When pan is hot, add chicken and saute 2 minutes on each side. Remove chicken. Saute onions in pan for 4 minutes. Add tomatoes and broth and cook for 8 minutes to blend flavors. Place reserved chicken in pan, stir to combine, Mix cheeses together and sprinkle over chicken. Bake about 15 minutes. Serve with ice or pasta.

title: Tarragon Dijon Chicken
steps: Spray 9 x 13 inch baking dish with non-stick cooking spray. Place chicken breasts flesh side down in baking dish. Combine remaining ingredients and pour over chicken. Cover snugly with aluminum foil, sealing edges. Bake one hour, 10 minutes at 350 degrees. During final 10 minutes, remove foil and turn the chicken flesh side up. remove chicken breasts to serving platter. Strain the reserved juice and spoon over each piece. Makes 6 servings.

title: Tender Chicken Nuggets

ingredients.item: chicken boned skinned cut into desired pieces (nuggets)

steps: In a shallow bowl, combine the first five ingredients. Place dressing in another bowl. Toss chicken nuggets in dressing then roll in cornflake mixture. Place in a greased 11 x 7 in baking pan. Bake, uncovered at 400 degrees for 12-15 minutes or until juices run clear. Serve with additional dressing for dipping. Serves 4

title: Three Cheese Chicken Bake

ingredients.item: 10 3/4 oz. cream of chicken soup, undiluted

steps: In a skillet, saute onion and green pepper in butter until tender. Remove from the heat. Stir in the soup, mushrooms, pimientos and basil; set aside. In a large bowl, combine noodles, chicken and cheeses; add mushroom sauce and mix well. Transfer to a greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking dish. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 40-45 minutes or until bubbly. Sprinkle with crumbs. Bake 15 minutes longer. 12-15 servings

title: Aunt Suzi's Brisket
steps: Heat oven to 325 degrees. Mix first 4 ingredients; stir in beer.
Place brisket, fat side up, in a roasting pan; pierce with a fork,. Arrange potatoes and carrots evenly around brisket; pour beer mixture evenly over brisket, potatoes and carrots.

Bake, covered, at 325 degrees for 3 12/ hours, basting occasionally with sauce. Remove from oven and let brisket stand in pan, uncovered, 20 minutes. remove brisket from pan, and cut into slices. Return slices to pan with potatoes and carrots.
Bake, covered, 30 minutes or until tender.

title: Baked Steak
steps: Cut meat into 3 or four pieces coat with flour and salt. Brown meat in skillet with oil, on both sides, remove and place in casserole dish. Add vegetables to pan with Worcestershire sauce, bring to boil over medium heat, cook and stir for 2 minutes. Pour over meat. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 1 1/2 hour till tender. Sprinkle cheese over meat and heat till melted.

title: Barbecue Beef Roast
steps: Rub roast on all sided with salt and pepper, garlic salt and tenderizer. Put roast in baking pan. 13 x 9 x 2.
Combine next 9 ingredients in saucepan, bring to boil, reduce heat and simmer 15 minutes. Stir in butter and BBQ sauce into liquid.
Pour half of the sauce over roast and bake at 300 degrees for 2 1/2 hours. Basting frequently. Thinly slice roast and serve with remaining sauce.

title: Beef Brisket Pot Roast
steps: Heat oil in dutch oven. add brisket and brown on al lsides. Remove brisket, add onion and garlic. Cook over medium heat til tender. Add broth and remaining ingredients along with brisket. Bring to boil. Cover, reduce heat, simmer for 2 hours, remove brisket. Pour juices and onions into blender and blend to make nice sauce. Slice meat 1/4 thick. Return everything to pan and simmer 1 hour more. Meat and mixture can be frozen up to 3 months. Perfect to have around when surprise guests come around.

title: Beef Lombardi
steps: Cook ground beef in a large skillet over medium heat 5 to 6 minutes, stirring until it crumbles and is no longer pink. Drain.
Stir in chopped tomatoes and next 4 ingredients; cook 5 minutes. Add tomato paste and bay leaf, and simmer 30 minutes.
Cook egg noodle, according to package directions; drain.
Stir together cooked egg noodles, chopped green onions, and sour cream until blended.
Place noodle mixture in bottom of a lightly greased 13 by 9 inch baking dish. Top with beef mixture;sprinkle evenly with cheeses.
Bake covered with aluminum foil, aa 350 degrees for 35 minutes. Uncover casserole,and bake more minutes. Garnish if desired.
Can freeze this casserole up to a month. defrost in refrig overnight and bake as directed.

title: Cheesy Potato Meat Pie
steps: Combine ground beef, bread crumbs, onion, salt, pepper and evaporated milk just until blended. Press firmly into 9 inch pie plate. Bake in preheated 350 degree oven for 35 to 40 minutes. Spoon off drippings. Combine mashed potatoes, pimiento, green pepper and 3/4 cup of the cheese. Frost meat pie with potato mixture;top with remaining 1/4 cup cheese. Bake 10 additional minutes. Makes 6 servings.

title: Chicken Fried Steak
steps: Combine first 3 ingredients; sprinkle on both sides of steaks. Combine egg and 2 tablespoons milk in a shallow dish. Dip steaks in egg mixture; dredge in cracker crumbs. Pour oil to depth of 1/2 inch into a large, heavy duty skillet. Fry steaks in hot oil over medium heat until browned, turning once. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer, turning occasionally, 15 minutes or until tender. Remove steaks and drain on paper towels. Keep warm.

Drain off drippings, reserving 3 tablespoons in skillet. Add 3 tablespoons flour, stirring constantly. Gradually add broth and 1/2 cup milk; cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly. Stir in Worcestershire and hot sauce. Serve gravy with steaks and rice or potatoes.

title: Chili
steps: Brown meat and onions in large pan. Stir in tomatoes, tomato sauce, liquid from kidney beans and seasonings. Simmer uncovered 45 minutes stirring occasionally. Add (2) beans and corn. Cook 15 minutes more. Tabasco to taste. Add more beans if necessary or needed..

title: Cottage Pie
steps: Fry the chopped onion in butte, slowly stir in the flour. Add stock gradually until the mixture thickens. Add seasonings. Add meat. Place mixture in a well greased pie dish. Boil potatoes, and mash with margarine and milk. Spread over the meat mixture. Bake at 400 degrees for 30 minutes.

title: Easy Cabbage and Beef Rolls
steps: Remove 10 outer leaves of cabbage. Cover leaves with boiling water; cover and let stand 10 minutes. Drain well.

Combine 1/2 cup tomato sauce and next 7 ingredients, mixing well. Place 1/3 cup of meat mixture in center of each cabbage leaf. Fold 2 opposite ends over, and place rolls, seam side down, in a lightly greased 8-inch baking dish. Combine remaining tomato sauce, sugar, and lemon juice; pour over cabbage rolls. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour.

Remove cabbage rolls to a serving platter; drain tomato sauce mixture into a saucepan. Combine cornstarch and water, stirring until smooth; stir into tomato sauce mixture. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly. Boil 1 minute. Pour over cabbage rolls.

title: Hamburger Layer Cake
steps: Combine eggs, catsup, bread crumbs, 1 1/2 tsp salt, 5 tsp Worcestershire sauce. Add meat and mix lightly. Divide mixture in half. Shape each half into 8 inch circles. Place on lightly greased jelly roll pan. Bake at 450 degree oven 10 minutes. Heat oil in skillet, add onions, peppers and mushrooms, saute 5 minutes. Add tomato, 1 tsp Worcestershire sauce and 1/2 tsp salt. Cook 2 minutes longer. Sandwich half of vegetables between meat rounds. top with remaining vegetables.

title: Italian Meat Rolls
steps: Combine all ingredients except egg and cornflake crumbs in bowl, mix well, shape into four even loves or rolls. Dip into egg, dredge in crumbs. Place on broiler rack. Bake at 350 degrees 30-35 minutes until done.

title: Make Ahead Meatballs
steps: In a large bowl, beat eggs. Add the next five ingredients. Add beef; mix well. Shape into 1 inch balls, about 12 dozen. Place in single layers in ungreased 15 in x 10 in by 1 in baking pans. Bake at 400 degrees for 10-15 minutes or until no longer pink, turning often; drain. Cool. Place about 30 meatballs each into freezer bags or containers. May be frozen for up to 3 months; Yield: 5 batches about 30 meatballs each.

Top make meatballs all same size. Roll out meat to a square about 1 inch thick. Measure and cut into 1 inch squares then roll into one inch balls. They should be all about equal in size for even cooking time.

title: Meat Loaf
steps: Mix meat and oatmeal thoroughly. Put all other ingredients in a blender, blend until thoroughly mixed. Add to meat mixture, put in a loaf pan and make loaf. Bake at 375 degrees for 1 1/2 hours or until done.

title: Meatball Sandwiches
steps: Place meatballs in an ungreased 1-qt baking dish. Combine the next five ingredients; pour over meatballs. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour. Serve on rolls. Yield: 6 servings.
These meatballs may be served as appetizers with toothpicks instead of rolls.

title: Meatballs
steps: Mix all together, add meatballs (I use frozen Italian meatballs). Simmer for hours for flavor to get through.

title: Onion Layered Hamburger
steps: Have butter soft enough to cream, mix thoroughly with dry onion soup. Chill. At serving time make eight thin patties of hamburg. Put some mixture on center of patties, top with more patties and work edges together well with fingers to seal. Brown hamburger in a little butter in a heavy skillet. Remove and add some water to drippings in skillet, pour over hamburger.

title: Pie Burger
steps: Brown lightly: 1 lb ground beef with 1 pkg dry onion soup mix and 1/2 tsp salt in skillet. Add 1/3 cup pickle relish or finely chopped cucumber pickle and 2 to 4 tbs chili sauce. Set aside. Make pie dough and add beef filling.

title: Roast Beef
steps: In Dutch oven brown beef on all sides in oil, remove set aside add garlic and onion, saute 5 minutes. Add coffee, 2 cups water, bouillon, salt and pepper, basil. Return meat, bring to boil, then simmer covered 2 1/2 hours or until done. Remove meat, mix flour and 1/2 cup water, whisk into drippings until thickened, slice cut roast, pour gravy over and serve.

title: Savory Pepper Steak
steps: Cut steak into strips. Combine flour; salt and pepper; toss with steak strips to coat thoroughly. Add to stoneware with onion, garlic and half of pepper strips; stir. Combine tomatoes with beef base, soy sauce and Worcestershire sauce. Pour into stoneware, moistening meat well. Cover, cook on low 10 to 12 hours (High 5 to 6 hrs) One hour before serving, stir in remaining pepper strips. Serve over hot rice.

title: Skillet Stew
steps: Mix beef with onions, egg, bread, salt, pepper and dry mustard with fork in bowl, form lightly into small balls. Brown meat balls on all sides in hot fat in large heavy skillet, remove mea balls, pour out excess grease from pan. Heat juice, water, garlic, bay leaf, chili powder, salt and pepper in same pan. Add carrots and onion, bringing to boil, reduce heat,simmer covered, 30 minutes. Add meat balls to stew, baste with sauce bring to boil.

title: Slow Cooked Pepper Steak

ingredients.item: tomatoes cut in 8ths (can use canned tomatoes)

steps: Cut beef into 3 inch by 1 inch strips. Brown in oil in a skillet. Transfer to a slow cooker. Combine the next seven ingredients; pour over beef. Cover and cook on low for 5-6 hours or until meat is tender. Add tomatoes and green peppers; cook on low for 1 hour longer. Combine the cold water and cornstarch to make a paste; stir into liquid in slow cooker and cook on high until thickened. Serve over noodles or rice.

title: Soup Meat 'n Potatoes Pie
steps: Mix thoroughly 1/2 cup soup, beef, onion, egg, bread crumbs, parsley, and seasonings. Press firmly into 9 inch pie plate. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes; spoon off fat. Frost with potatoes; op with remaining soup and cheese. Bake 10 minutes more or until done. Garnish with cooked bacon if desired. Makes on 9-inch meat pie.

title: Spicy Marinated Eye Round
steps: Place roast in pan, add onions, salt and pepper. Bake covered at 325 degrees for 3 hours and 30 minutes. Cool and slice thinly.
Place roast in casserole dish, add spicy sauce, cover and chill for 8 hours. When ready remove from fridge and let stand for 30 minutes. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
SPICY SAUCE
Bring all ingredients to a boil, reduce heat and simmer 1 hour. Remove Bay leaf.

title: Sukiyaki

ingredients.item: beef bouillon cube dissolved in 1 cup water

steps: Heat oil in electric skillet set at medium heat. Add all vegetables except spinach and cook for a few minutes. Sprinkle tomatoes over top so hey stay crisp. Pour consomme or bouillon, soy sauce and sugar over vegetables and stir. Add the spinach and steak. Simmer for a while, serve hot from skillet.

title: Sweet and Sour Meatballs

ingredients.item: green pepper, cut into 1 inch pieces

steps: Drain pineapple, reserving juice. Set pineapple aside. Add water to juice if need to measure 1 cup; pour into a large skillet. Add 1/3 cup water, vinegar, soy sauce,brown sugar and cornstarch; stir until smooth. Cook over medium heat until thick, stirring constantly. Add pineapple, meatballs and green pepper. Simmer, uncovered, for 20 minutes or until heated through. Serve over rice. Yield: 6 servings.???

title: Swiss Steak

ingredients.item: beef round steak, cut into serving size

steps: Heat oil in skillet. Coat steak with flour and brown in hot oil. Remove from skillet and drain. Place potatoes, carrots and onion in bottom of stoneware. Place steak on top of vegetables. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Pour tomatoes and tomato sauce over meat. Cover and cook on low 10 to 12 hours. (High 5 to 6 hours)

title: Swiss Steak I
steps: Combine flour,salt and pepper. Pound flour into steak. Brown steak and onion slices in butter. Then add tomato soup, water and vinegar, cover and simmer until tender.

title: Baked Pork Chops
steps: Combine garlic powder, Italian seasoning, and pepper. Sprinkle over both sides or pork chops.
Brown pork chops in oil heated at medium high in large skillet.
Place chop in a 2 quart shallow baking dish.

In same skillet, combine soup and water, bring to a boil. Pour over chops. Sprinkle with mixture o Parmesan cheese and bread crumbs. Bake coverd in preheated 350 degree oven for 45 minutes. Remove cover and continue baking for 15 minutes.

title: Bar-B-Q Pork Roast
steps: Cook pork in salted water over low heat for 2-2 1/2 hours. Drain and cool Save cup of broth. Cut pork in thin slices. Put in casserole dish. Combine all remaining ingredients, mix well, pour over pork, bake at 325 degrees for 30-45 minutes.
FOR PULLED PORK. Shred pork with 2 forks, make sauce sauce in pan with remaining ingredients, add shredded pork, let simmer till ready to eat or make sandwiches.

title: Barbecue Pork Shoulder
steps: Cover meat with slightly salted water and cook over medium heat 2-2 1/2 hours till tender. Drain. Slice into thin slices place in 2 quart baking dish. Combine all the spice ingredients and spoon over pork slices. Bake at 300 degrees for 45 minutes. Turn meat occasionally.

title: Barbecued Pork Loin
steps: Place pork loin in roasting pan. In a medium saucepan, combine sugar, paprika, salt, pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, Worcestershire sauce, pepper sauce, lemon juice, vinegar and water, bring to boiling point. Spoon some sauce over meat. Roast pork loin at 325 degrees for about 2 to 2 1/2 hours or to an internal temperature of at least 160 on a meat thermometer. Baste pork frequently with the sauce. Pork loin roast serves 6

title: Bev's Recipe
steps: Spread oil on bottom of pan, dice potatoes and onions, peppers and spices and meat. Stir all together. Bake at 350 degrees for approximately 30 minutes.

title: Breaded Baked Pork Chops
steps: Trim all feta from chops. Beat egg white with evaporated milk. Place cops in milk mixture and let stand for 5 minutes, tuning chops once.
Meanwhile, mix together cornflake crumbs, spices, and salt. Spray a 9 x 13 in baking pan with nonstick spray. Remove chops from milk mixture. Coat thoroughly with crumb mixture,
Place chops in baking dish and bake at 375 degrees for 20 minutes. Turn chops and bake 15 minutes longer or until no longer pink. Makes 6 servings.

title: Cacoila

ingredients.item: pork butt or pork shoulder (cut in chunks)

steps: Cook in slow pot all day on low.

title: Carolina Barbecued Pork
steps: Combine all ingredients together, add to slow pot and cook for a number of hours (High 5 to 6 hours)

title: Chili Pork Chops
steps: Heat 2 tbsp of vegetable oil in large oven proof skllet; brown pork chops on both sides. Remove chops and sprinkle with beef soup mix nd black pepper. Combine soup, beans, rice, onion, chili seasoning, and garlic powder granules in skillet or 11 x 7 inch baking dish. Place pork chops over soup mixture. Cover and bake at 325 degrees for 45-55 minutes or until chops are tender. Top each chop with a green pepper ring that has been brushed with oil he last 10 minutes of baking time. Serves 6.

title: Chourico Stewed w/Cabbage
steps: Saute onion and garlic in oil. Slice chourico and add with remaining ingredients. Simmer until cabbage is well cooked.

title: Cranberry Roast Pork
steps: Place pork roast in a slow cooker. In a medium bowl, mash cranberry sauce; stir in sugar, cranberry juice, mustard and cloves. Pour over roast. Cover and cook on low for 6-8 hours or until meat is tender. Remove roast and keep warm. Skim fat from juices; measure 2 cups, adding water if necessary, and pour into a saucepan. Bring to boil over medium -high heat. Combine cornstarch and cold water to make a paste; stir into gravy. Cook and stir until thickened. Season with salt. Served with sliced pork.

title: Cretons (gorton)
steps: In a large saute pan, add the pork and cook until no longer pink, about 3 to 5 minutes. Add the onions and garlic, and cook for 1 minute. Add the salt, pepper and Bell seasoning and cook for 1 minute. Add the milk and bread crumbs and cook for 3 minutes over medium heat, stirring to break up the meat. Reduce heat to low, cover and cook, stirring occasionally, until the pork is very tender and most of the liquid is evaporated, about 1 hour and 15 minutes. Remove the lid and cook uncovered, stirring occasionally, until the mixture is thick and all liquid is evaporated, about 10 to 15 minutes. Remove from heat and adjust seasoning, to taste. Transfer to a decorative bowl or several smaller ramekins, smoothing the top with a rubber spatula.

title: Fried Pork Sandwich

ingredients.item: egg, eaten with a little water
dried oregano (or other spices you may like)

steps: Pound pork with mallet to thickness your prefer. Coat both sides with stone ground mustard. Place the flour in a bowl or on a paper plate. Mix together the breadcrumbs, garlic powder, oregano, salt and pepper. Dip each pork chop into the flour and shake off excess. Then dip into the egg wash, and finally into the breadcrumbs, coating both sides. Place on a baking tray and refrigerate about 30 minutes to ensure that coating sticks during frying.

Heat just enough olive oil to thoroughly cover the bottom of a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the pork in batches if necessary, and fry until brown and done, about 4 minutes per side. Drain on paper towels. Place each piece of pork on a roll. Top with cheese (if desired) and pickle slices. Spread mayonnaise and/or mustard on other half of roll and place on top sandwich.

title: Gorton
steps: Shred pork add seasoning add water just to cover meat, add whole cloves to onion (spike on) for easy removal later. Simmer slowly until most water has disappeared. Remove all cloves, take count. Drain, pour into dish or mold and chill till firm.

title: Hot Dogs/ Sweet Sour Cabbage
steps: In skillet: Cook cabbage in margarine until light brown. Mix remaining ingredients except hot dogs into cabbage. Place hot dogs on top, cover tightly, cook over low heat 8-10 minutes till done.

title: Italian Pork Roast

ingredients.item: rolled boneless pork loin roast beef

steps: Place roast in a shallow roasting pan. Cut 8 small slits into roast at 2 inch intervals; insert garlic halves deep into slits. Brush olive oil evenly over roast, and sprinkle with Italian seasoning and pepper. Insert meat thermometer, making sure it does no touch fat. Bake at 325 degrees for 1 1/2 hours (30 minutes per pound) or until thermometer reaches 155 degrees. Remove from oven and cover loosely with foil. Let stand 15 minutes or until temp reaches 160 degrees.

title: Maple Glazed Pork Tenderloin
steps: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Place pork in an 11 by 7 inch baking dish.
In a medium bowl, mix the maple syrup, chili sauce, soy sauce, orange juice concentrate, mustard, Worcestershire sauce, curry powder and garlic. Pour over the pork.
Bake for about 30 to 40 minutes, or until a meat thermometer inserted into the tenderloin reads 150
Remove from oven and allow to stand for 10 minutes before slicing into 1/4 inch slices; spoon the sauce on top and sprinkle with sesame seeds

title: Pork Barbecue on Buns
steps: Combine all ingredients except buns in 4 quart slow cooker; cook, covered on high for 5-6 hours, until very tender. Drain and slice or shred pork; serve on buns with additional sauce. if desired.

title: Pork BBQ Sandwiches
steps: Place pork roast, water and salt in a Dutch oven. Cover and simmer for 3 1/2 to 4 hours or until meat is very tender. Remove meat and discard bone; shred meat with two forks. Skim fat from pan juices. Stir in celery, steak sauce, vinegar, brown sugar, lemon juice, chili sauce, ketchup and shredded pork. Cover and simmer 1 hour. In a large skillet over low heat, saute onions and sugar in oil and butter for 20-30 minutes or until golden brown and tender, stirring occasionally. Serve pork and onions on buns.

title: Pork Chop Ole'
steps: In a large skillet, brown pork chops in oil. Sprinkled with seasoned salt and pepper. Meanwhile in a greased 13 x 9 x 3 baking dish, combine rice, water, tomato sauce and taco seasoning, mix well. Arrange pork shops over rice, top with green pepper. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 1 1/2 hours. Uncover and sprinkle with cheese. Return to oven until cheese is melted.

title: Portuguese Pork Chops
steps: Fry veggies and chops the cover and simmer for at least 1/2 hour.

title: Pulled Pork
steps: In a small bowl, combine the dry ingredients. Rub into both sides or the pork roast. Place a wire rack in the bottom of a 3-4 qt or larger crockpot. Pour water in pot and place pork on wire rack. Cover and cook on low for 8 to 10 hours. Or on high for 4 to 5 hours. About 1 hour before serving combine ingredients for Barbecue sauce in a medium saucepan. Place on medium high heat, bring to a simmer, cook stirring occasionally for 30 minutes. Remove pork from slow cooker and let stand for 20 minutes or so. Using 2 forks shred pork to suit. Remove rack from pan and remove all grease and unsightly drippings. Lower heat to low add the shredded pork and sauce to pan and reheat for about 30 minutes.
SAUCE ingredients ABOVE

title: Sausage and Pepper Ragout

ingredients.item: bell peppers, cut in 1 in. squares

steps: Cook sausage over medium heat in large skillet. Remove from pan; cut into 1-inch pieces. Set aside.
Melt butte in same pan. Add onion, and garlic; cook until softened, 2 to 3 minutes. Add bell peppers and cook over medium-high heat, stirring often, until limp, 5 to 6 minutes.

Add tomatoes with liquid, basil, sugar,salt and pepper; heat to a boil. Reduce heat, add sausages, and simmer until thickened, 5 minutes. Adjust seasoning ad serve hot. Can be made in advance and reheated.

title: Shredded Pork Sandwiches
steps: Place roast in Dutch oven. In bowl combine all ingredients, pour over roast, cover and cook over medium low heat for 4 to 6 hours till tender. Shred meat with forks. Serve on rolls.

title: Sweet and Sour Pork

ingredients.item: boneless pork loin cut in bite size pieces

steps: Combine the first 3 ingredients; add pork, and let stand 20 minutes. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large nonstick skillet; add garlic, onion, and green pepper. Stir-fry 2 minutes or until crisp-tender; remove from skillet, and set aside.

Drain pork. Heat remaining 2 tablespoons oil in skillet; add pork. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring constantly, 3 to 5 minutes or until lightly browned. Pour off excess oil. Stir in cooked vegetables.

Combine sugar and next 6 ingredients, stirring until cornstarch dissolves; add to pork mixture. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture comes to a boil. Add pineapple, and boil 1 minute, stirring constantly. Serve over hot cooked rice.

title: Tangy Baked Pork Chops
steps: Mix all ingredients, except pork or chicken, in a 2 quart saucepan. Bring to a boil and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes. Brown chops or chicken; place in a baking dish. Cover with sauce; bake for 1 1/2 to 2 hours at 350 degrees. Serves 6.

title: French Meat Pie
steps: Cook hamburger and pork with onions, in pot with enough water to cover meat, until all water is evaporated. Allow to cook slowly.
While resting, boil potatoes and mash. When meat is finished, drain what little water is left, add the potatoes to meat and mix well, adding the spices and salt and pepper.
Fill prepared pie crusts with meat filling, cut vents in top of crust and coat with milk or egg wash and cook to desired temperature til crust is golden brown. I think that is at 375 degrees.

title: French Meat Pie
steps: Saute onion. Remove from pan add pork and beef cook till brown. Remove fat. Combine onion, mea, spice, potatoes. Mix well. Fill pie shell, cover with top crust, brush with egg wash. Bake at 375 degrees about 30-35 minutes till crust is golden brown.

title: Individual Meat Loaves
steps: Combine first 7 ingredients; set aside. Remove crusts from bread; cut bread into cubes. Combine bread cubes, eggs and milk in mixing bowl; beat at medium speed with an electric mixer until smooth. Stir in meat mixture, and shape into 6 individual loaves; roll each in bread crumbs. Place in a lightly greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan. Spread chili sauce over loaves. Pour boiling water into dish. Bake, uncovered a 350 degrees for 1 hour. Transfer loaves to a serving platter; garnish if desired. Yield; 6 servings.

title: Leg of Lamb w/Beans
steps: Cover beans with cold water and soak overnight.
Next day drain beans reserving liquid; add water to liquid to measure 2 qts. Pour beans and Liquid into 6 quart kettle, bring to boiling, simmer for 45 minutes or until beans are tender.
Saute onions in margarine with 1 clove of garlic until tender.
In roasting pan combine beans, onion mixture, seasoned salt, tomatoes and salt and pepper. Mix well.
Rub remaining garlic clove over lamb, sprinkle seasoned salt and rosemary all over lamb. Bake uncovered 3 1/2-4 hours.

title: Meat Pie
steps: Cook meats, onion, garlic until all is brown, add spices. Add mashed potatoes to mixture bind all together. Fill pie crust with mixture. Brush top with egg wash bake at 375 degrees for 30-35 minutes until golden brown.

title: Swedish Meat Balls
steps: Blend meats, crumbs and milk. Saute onion in butter and add to meat with eggs and seasoning. Mix with hands to get even texture, roll into small balls. Brown in butter. Remove. To pan juices add, flour and consomme to make gravy . Return meatballs to gravy and simmer over very low heat. Stir until hot, check seasoning and add lemon juice. Return meatballs to gravy and simmer over very low heat for 1 hour. Remove meatballs to serving platter. Stir sour cream into gravy and heat. Pour over meat balls.

title: Swedish Meatballs
steps: Blend meats, crumbs and milk. Saute onions in butter and add to meats with egg and seasonings. Mix well to get everything blended. Roll into balls. Brown in butter. Remove as they are cooked. To pan juices add flour and consomme, add lemon juice. Return balls to gravy and simmer 1 hour. Remove meat balls. Add sour cream to gravy and heat. Pour over meatballs.
?? ?? Depends on how many you want to make. May need to add more crumbs etc. depending on amount you make.

title: Veal (or Chicken) Spaghetti
servings: Serves 4 but may be increased to
steps: Saute in oil, the green pepper till tender, remove from pan. Season veal (or chicken) with salt/pepper, cook over medium heat until lightly brown. Add green pepper and remaining ingredients. Simmer uncovered one hour til meat is tender. Serve over spaghetti. Add more tomatoes or water to increase sauce. I enjoy adding onions also. Wine can be eliminated. Serves 4 but may be increased to serve more.

title: Veal Cutlets
steps: Slice veal into thin slices and pound with mallet to 1/4" thickness. Combine egg, water, oil, beat well. Combine bread crumbs and spices. Dip cutlets in egg mixture and then crumb mixture. Then fry in margarine. Sprinkle with grated parmesan.

title: Baked Flounder or Sole
steps: Saute onions. Place carrots and onions on bottom of baking dish. Place fish on top. In a bowl mix sour cream and tomato soup for sauce. Pour sauce over fish. Top with potato chips. Bake at 375 degrees for 35-40 minutes until done.

title: Easy Baked Fish Fillets

ingredients.item: orange roughy, tilapia or other fish

steps: Mix first four ingredients. Brush over fillets. Dredge in cornflakes. Place on greased baking sheet. Bake at 450 degrees 10 minutes or till tender.

title: Fish and Chips
steps: Rinse and dry fish. Roll in flour seasoned with salt. Dip into batter, coating well. Heat oil to 375 degrees in saucepan, fry fish 4 minutes or until golden brown. Drain. Keep hot in low oven. Add potatoes to fat and fry as usual.

title: Hot Crab Dip
steps: Defrost and drain crabmeat well. Mix all ingredients together. Bake at 375 degrees for 15-20 minutes or heat in Microwave. Serve on crackers or Pepperidge Farm party rye

title: Mock Lobster Casserole

ingredients.item: bread crumbs or crushed Ritz crackers.

steps: Place fish in a greased 2-qt casserole. Sprinkle with salt. Mix soup with lemon juice. Pour over fish. Bake uncovered for 20 minutes at 375 degrees. While baking, saute onion and garlic in butter. Remove from heat and add Worcestershire sauce. Then blend with crumbs. Sprinkle crumb mixture over fish and bake 10 minutes more. Serves 6.

title: Salmon Patties
steps: Drain salmon, reserving liquid; set liquid aside. Remove skin and bones from salmon if desired; flake with a fork, and set aside.

Combine cracker crumbs and reserve liquid; let stand 5 minutes or until liquid is absorbed. Stir in salmon, cornmeal, and next 3 ingredients. Shape salmon mixture into 6 patties. Pour oil to depth of 1/4 inch into a large heavy skillet. Fry patties in hot oil over medium heat until browned, turning one,. Drain patties on paper towels.

title: Shrimp Creole
steps: Cook onion, celery, green peppers and garlic in butter for 5 minutes. Stir in tomato sauce. Simmer for 10 minutes. Add water if needed, add shrimp. Heat to boiling, cover and simmer over medium heat 10-20 minutes or until shrimp are done. Serve over rice.

title: Stuffed Lobster Supreme
steps: Cook lobster tails in boiling salted water until done. Drain, and with scissors cut bottom of shell to remove meat nd save the shell to stuff. Cut meat into dice chunks.

Saute lobster mea in butter in large frying pan 2 to 3 minutes, remove from heat, blend in flour, salt, paprika, slowly stir in cream, cook stirring constantly until mixture thickens and boils 1 minute, stir in lemon juice.
Spoon filling into shells, sprinkle tops lightly with cracker crumbs, add melted butter. Bake at 450 degrees about 12 minutes.

title: Tilapia Fillets in Lemon Sauce
steps: Combine margarine or butte and lemon juice. Mix together in a medium bowl with the bead crumbs, parsley and 1/4 cup of the lemon mixture. Place on ovenproof dish and broil until the tilapia flakes easily with a fork. Top with bread mixture and broil again until heated through. Cooking times varies depending on size of fillets. 7 to 9 minutes.

title: Baked Pasta
steps: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Coat a 2-quart baking dish with cooking spray and set aside.
Cook pasta according to directions without salt or oil.

In a large nonstick skillet, cool beef over medium heat 5-6 minutes or until no longer pink. Stir and beak up the lumps of meat as you stir; drain well. Add cooked pasta, soup and optional garlic. Season with salt and pepper. Spoon mixture into baking dish and top with cheese.
Bake 30 minutes or until cheese is melted and mixture is bubbling.

title: Cheesy Macaroni Divan
steps: Bring a large pot of water to boil and cook the macaroni for 7 to 9 minutes, or until it reaches the desired tenderness.

Meanwhile, in a 2 quart or larger saucepan, melt the margarine over medium heat. Add the flour and cook, stirring constantly for 1 minute as the mixture forms a paste. Add the milk slowly, stirring constantly, and cook for 3 minutes until the milk thickens slightly. Do not let milk boil. You may have a few lumps. Ignore them. Add the mustard and the cheese, stiring until the cheese sauce is smooth. Drain the chicken and add it to the cheese sauce, flaking it with your fingers as you add it. Remove the sauce from the heat until the macaroni is done.
Meanwhile, rinse the broccoli off with cool water and put it in a microwave safe container. Cover and microwave for 3 minutes at high. Set aside.

When the macaroni is just tender, remove it from the heat and drain thoroughly. Pour the drained macaroni back into the pasta pot. Drain the broccoli if necessary, and pour it into pasta pot. Add the cheese sauce and stir to mix well. Season with black pepper to taste. Serve.

title: Creamy Mac and Cheese
steps: Bring a large pot of water to boil and cook the macaroni for 7 to 9 minutes or until desired tenderness is reached.
Meanwhile, measure out the rest of your ingredients and set beside the stovetop.

In a a medium size saucepan, melt margarine over medium low heat. Add flour and cook, stirring constantly for 1 minute as mixture forms a paste. Add milk slowly, stirring constantly, and cook for 3 minutes until milk thickens slightly. Do not let the milk boil. Add mustard and the cheese, stirring until cheese sauce is smooth. Remove sauce from heat until noodles are done.

When noodles are just tender, remove from heat and drain thoroughly. Pour drained noodles into pan with cheese sauce and stir to mix well. Add ham, if desired and stir. Salt and pepper to taste. Serve

title: Mixed Pasta with Caramelized Vegetables

ingredients.item: yellow, orange or red bell pepper, chopped

steps: Place the pasta in 2 1/2 quarts of already boiling unsalted water and cook until tender, about 10 to 12 minutes.

Heat the oil on medium high in an extra deep, 12 inch nonstick skillet. Peel and coarsely chop the onions, adding them to the skillet as you chop. Seed and coarsely chop both bell peppers, adding them to the skillet as you chop. Cook the vegetables, stirring from time to time, for minutes, The onions will begin to turn golden brown (caramelize).

Add the garlic and cook 2 more minutes. Remove the pan from the heat. Drain the pasta well, and add it to the skillet. Toss well to distribute the vegetables. (Or pour the pasta and vegetables into 3 quart or larger serving bowl and toss. Season with salt to taste. Sprinkle the Parmesan cheese over the dish and serve.

title: Pasta with Four-Cheese Sauce

ingredients.item: low fat milk (can use whole milk)
White or Black pepper to taste

steps: Cook noodle in salted boiling water until just tender (about 10 minutes) Drain and set aside.

Add flour to small nonstick saucepan. Slowly stir in 1/4 cup of the milk and stir until smooth. Slowly stir in remaining milk. Heat mixture over medium low heat, stirring constantly until just beginning to thicken (about 2 minutes).

Add garlic, Parmesan, Swiss cheese, cream cheese and blue cheese to saucepan with milk mixture. Continue to cook over low heat, stirring constantly until all ingredients are melted and mixture is reasonably smooth. If it is too thick, add a tablespoon or two of milk and stir. Add white or black pepper to taste.

title: Spinach Cheese Manicotti

ingredients.item: 10 oz frozen chopped spinach, thawed and squeezed

steps: In a small skillet, saute onion and garlic in oil for 3 minutes; set aside. In a mixing bowl combine the ricotta, 1/2 cup mozzarella, cream cheese, 4 tbs Parmesan, Italian seasoning and pepper; beat until smooth. Stir in onion mixture, add the chopped spinach, mix well then stuff the manicotti shells, place in Baking dish cover with sauce and remaining mozzarella and Parmesan cheeses. Bake at 350 degrees till done.

title: Baked Rice
steps: Saute onion in butter til translucent. Add rice and stir till coated. Bring chicken stock to boil, add parsley and salt. Pour into 1 quart casserole, cover and bake at 375 degrees about 20 minutes or liquid is gone. Serves 6

title: Creole Rice
steps: In a medium saucepan with cover, heat oil over medium high heat. Add onion and garlic. Saute for 4 to 5 minutes. Stir in bell pepper, oregano, salt, thyme, and cayenne. Cook for 1 minute. Add bay leaves, tomato sauce and water; bring to a boil. Stir in rice, cover and reduce heat to low. Cook for 20 minutes or until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed. Let stand covered for 5 minutes. Remove bay leaves.

title: Green Rice Casserole

ingredients.item: Monterey Jack of Swiss cheese or both shredded

steps: Combine 1 cup Monterey Jack and next 4 ingredients in a large bowl, stir in rice, veggies and onions. Spoon into lightly greased large casserole dish. Bake: uncovered at 375 degrees for about 20 minutes. Sprinkle with remaining cheese and bake 5 minutes more.

title: Honey and Wild Rice Dressing

ingredients.item: Granny Smith apples, peeled, cored, chopped

steps: Melt margarine in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onions, apples, and celery.
Cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 5 minutes.
Combine onion mixture and remaining ingredients in a large bowl.
Transfer to a casserole dish and bake covered at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.

title: Infallible Rice
steps: Saute onion in better until transparent. Combine onion, rice and hot broth. Bring to a boil on top of range. Cover and place in 325 degree oven for 20 minutes. Serve and listen to compliments.
Enough for six polite people.

title: Low Country Red Rice

ingredients.item: cup chicken stock, broth or water

steps: In a heavy saucepan, fry the bacon until it is crisp. Remove bacon from the pan and drain on a paper towel. When cool, crumble bacon.
Pour off the excess bacon grease, leaving only enough to coat bottom of the pan. Add the chopped onion and saute until it softens, about 2 minutes.
Add the rice and saute until the grains are coated with the bacon grease, about 3 minutes.
Add the crushed tomatoes, salt, black pepper and cayenne pepper. Stir, add stock, both or water, stir again and cover pan. Cook mixture over low heat for 30 minutes without stiring.
Transfer the hot rice to a bowl and garnish with the crumbled bacon.

title: Oven Rice
steps: Combine all ingredients in 2 quart baking dish, stir well. Cover and bake at 350 degrees 1 hour or until liquid is all gone.

title: Spicy Pineapple Fried Rice

ingredients.item: 8 1/4 oz crushed pineapples in syrup, drained

steps: In large nonstick skillet, heat oil over medium low heat until hot. Add garlic, ginger and red pepper; cook and stir for 2 minutes.
Increase heat to medium high. Add rice and soy sauce; cook 2 minutes, stirring frequently. Add pineapple, tossing to combine; heat through.
Sprinkle with green onions before serving.

title: 1-2-3 Potato Salad

ingredients.item: red or new potatoes, cut into 3/4 inch chunks
Knorr Chicken or Vegetable Bouillon Cube

steps: In 4 quart saucepot, cover potatoes and bouillon cube with water. Bring to a boil over high heat. Reduce heat and cook uncovered 10 minutes or until potatoes are tender. Drain. Do not rinse. Let cool slightly.
In large bowl, combine cooled potatoes with mayonnaise. Chill, if desired, before serving. Garnish with parsley and black pepper.

title: Bacon Lover's Potato Salad
steps: Boil potatoes in heir skins in a covered saucepan until tender but not mushy (about 25 minutes). When they are cool enough to handle, remove skins and dice the potatoes into a large serving bowl.
Fry the bacon over low heat flipping often in a nonstick skillet until crisp. Drain well on paper towels and break into coarse bits of bacon; set aside.
Add the onion and celery to the serving bowl with the potatoes.

In the work bowl of a food processor fitted with a metal blade, combine bacon bits, mayonnaise, sour cream,sugar, seasoned salt and pepper. Pulse several times to blend. If the machine dies not have a pulse button, press the on-off button several times. Stir gently into potato mixture until well combined.
Chill the potato salad until you are ready to serve.

title: Baked Mashed Potatoes
steps: Bake potatoes at 400 degrees for 45 minutes till soft. Cut in half, scoop out centers into bowl. Save shells. Add butter, tomato puree and sour cream, mix well, season with salt and pepper, add cheese. Fill shells and broil until heated through.

title: Cheesy Potato Casserole
steps: Cook potatoes in boiling water to cover 30 minutes or until tender. Drain; let cool to touch. Peel and cut into 1/4 inch strips; set aside.

Combine 1/4 cup butter and next 5 ingredients in a large bowl; gently stir in potatoes and cheese. Spoon into a lightly greased 13 x 9 x 2 in baking dish. Combine 3 tablespoons butter and stuffing mix; sprinkle over potato mixture. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for 25 minutes or until thoroughly heated.

title: Holiday Make-Ahead Mashed Potatoes
steps: Place rosemary and cream in pan. Simmer on low heat.
Put potatoes in pot. Cover with cold water. Add salt. Bring to boil, then simmer until potatoes are fork tender 35-40 minutes. Remove from heat; drain.

Put potatoes back in po; return to heat to low. Remove rosemary from cream; pour liquid over potatoes. Add butter, cream cheese, garlic, broth and salt and pepper. Wjhip potatoes to desired consistency. Use additional milk if desired. Garnish

Pour potatoes into buttered 9 by 13 pan. Cover and refrigerate fo up to 4 days. Freeze fo 2 weeks. To heat, remove from efrigerator. Remove lid. Dot with butter. Cover potatoes with foil. Waarm in 350 degree oven for 30 minutes. Uncover. Bake 5-10 minutes. Stir to fluff before serving.

title: Home Style Potatoes
steps: Placer potatoes in a greased 2 quart baking dish. In a saucepan, combine water, butter, soup mix and rosemary; heat until butter is melted. Pour over potatoes. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 40 minutes. Uncover; bake 20 minutes longer or until the potatoes are tender.

title: Hot Potato Salad with Franks
steps: Combine 4 cups thinly sliced cooked potatoes with 1/3 cup salad oil, 3 tbs vinegar and 1 1/2 tsp salt and a dash of pepper. arrange alternate layers of salad mixture, thinly sliced onions and franks cut lengthwise in a 1 1/2 quart casserole. Cover casserole and bake at 350 degrees for 35-40 minutes.

title: Oven French Fries
steps: Mix cheese and oregano. Slice potato for French fries. Coat with egg white, dredge in cheese. Spray cookie sheet and bake 25 minutes at 450 degrees.

title: Oven Fried Potatoes
steps: Clean potatoes, cut into wedges, lay in 13 x 9 x 2 pan in single layer and brush with mixture of above ingredients. Bake at 375 degrees for 45 minutes or so. Basting occasionally with mixture.

title: Oven Roasted
steps: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Pour water into a roasting pan. Add vinegar to taste. The water should have just a hint of vinegary taste. Sprinkle paprika over the water and mix, removing the lumps. Add salt, pepper, onion, tomato, parsley and potatoes. Before cooking add chorizo. Bake for 2 hours. Do not cover the potatoes because they will steam and not roast. The potatoes will have a nice red color when they are done

title: Oven Roasted Potatoes
steps: Skin and cut potatoes to size wanted, generally quartered. Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Pour water into roasting pan. Add vinegar to taste. The water should have just a hint of vinegary taste. Sprinkle paprika over water and mix, removing the lumps. Add salt, pepper, onion and tomato, parsley and potatoes. Before cooking add chourico. Bake 2 hours. Do not cover potatoes because they will steam and not roast. The potatoes will have a nice red color when they are done.

title: Parmesan Potato Wedges
steps: Scrub potatoes and cut into wedges, soak potatoes in ice water for 30 minutes, drain and pat dry. Coat pan with cooking spray, arrange potatoes in one layer, brush with margarine. Combine spices, sprinkle over potatoes. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hours turning twice. Remove and sprinkle with parmesan and serve immediately.

title: Potatoes Anna
steps: Dips each slice potato in butter and layer in circles in greased 9 inch iron skillet. Season each layer with spices. Cover ad bake 450 degrees 15 to 20 minutes. Loosen, invert onto platter

title: Potatoes Poupon

ingredients.item: red skin potatoes (2 lbs) cut in chunks

steps: Mix all ingredients except potatoes in small bowl. Place potatoes in lightly greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking pan or on shallow baking sheets; toss with mustard mixture. Bake at 425 degrees for 35 to 40 minutes or until potatoes are fork tender, stirring occasionally, Makes 4 servings.

title: Roast Potatoes (Swedish Style)
steps: Peel potatoes, put in cold water to prevent discoloring. Put one potato at a time in spoon and slice done to edge of spoon 1/8 thick. Spoon stops them from slicing through.

Put potatoes in baking dish cut side up, baste with butter, sprinkle with salt. Cook 30 minutes at 425 degrees. Sprinkle crumbs over each potato. Cook 15 minutes or until golden brown. Add cheese 5 minutes before done.

title: Roasted Garlic Mashed Potatoes
steps: Heat oven to 450 degrees. Place the garlic on a pie pan and drizzle with olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Place in the oven and roast for 35 to 40 minutes, or until tender ad golden brown. Remove from the oven and cool. Squeeze or remove the garlic cloves from the head and place in a small bowl. Using a fork, mash the garlic until smooth.

Placer the potatoes in a pot of salted water ad baring to a boil. Reduce the heat to a simmer and cook the potatoes until fork tender, about 12 to 15 minutes. Remove the pan from the heat and drain. Place the potatoes back in the pot and return to the heat. Stir the potatoes, constantly, for 2 to 3 minutes to dehydrate the potatoes. Remove the potatoes from the heat.

Add the garlic and butter. Using a hand-held masher, mash the butter and garlic into the potatoes. Add enough cream until desired texture is achieved. The potatoes should be still be sort of lumpy. Season the potatoes with salt and pepper.

title: Stovetop Scalloped Potatoes
steps: Spread half of the butter on the bottom of a 12 inch nonstick skillet. Layer half of the potato slices, half ot the cheese and then half of the onions.
Sprinkle with half of the flour. Dot with half of the remaining butter. Sprinkle with half of the salt and half of he pepper. Repeat layers ending with salt and pepper.
Pour milk over all. Bring to simmering over high heat. Reduce heat to medium low, cover and cook until potato slices are tender, about 20 minutes.
Uncover skillet and simmer until sauce thickens, about 7 minutes.

title: Toasted Onion Mashed Potatoes
steps: Place potatoes in 4 1/2 qt saucepan or Dutch oven. Cover with cold water, add 2 tsp salt. Bring to a boil over high heat. Reduce heat to medium; boil potatoes until fork tender, 15 to 18 minutes. Drain.
In a 10 in nonstick skillet, melt 2 tbs butter over medium heat. Add onions; cook stirring occasionally, until onions are brown, 8 to 10 minutes. Set aside.

Place cooked hot potatoes in large mixer bowl. Mash slightly with fork. Beat at medium speed, adding cold butter 1 tablespoon at a time, until mixed, 30 to 60 seconds. Continue beating, gradually adding browned onions and all remaining ingredients until well mixed 1 to 2 minutes. Do not overbeat. Serve.

title: Warm Potato Salad

ingredients.item: red pepper sliced in 2 inch strips

steps: Boil the potatoes until they seem almost done, drain, set aside and let cool to room temperature.

Place the bacon in a saute pan and add the 1/2 cup of olive oil and saute the bacon until it is cooked (but not browned). It should be tender. Continue to simmer while adding the seasonings to the bacon, thyme, garlic, oregano, salt, pepper and basil.
Simmer together for five minutes.
This will allow the spices to blend and become stronger in flavor.

Next remove the bacon mixture from the saute pan and place in a large bowl. Add the last cup of olive oil, stir in the parsley and red onions. Now begin quartering the room temperature red potatoes into the bacon mixture.

Fold the bacon and seasoning mixture over the potatoes, blending gently so you don't crush the potatoes. Sprinkle the red peppers over the potato salad as a garnish. Let the salad rest for one hour before serving, this will allow the seasoning to work through the salad.
If you would like a little extra flavor or just something a little different, add the 2 tsp of chicken stock powder when mixing the list of seasonings together.
his is a great tasting potato salad, with the flavor getting even better the next day.

Then to give this salad the introduction it deserves,scoop a portion of your potato salad onto romaine lettuce leaf for a nice look. Or really have some fun and slice and English cucumber in half lengthwise, hollow out the halves and the place on the cucumber. Wow.

title: Best Baked Beans
steps: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Spray a 9 by 11 baking dish with cooking oil spray.
Pour all of the beans with their liquids into the dish. Peel and coarsely chop the onion, and add it to the dish. Seed and dice the bell pepper, and add it to the dish.
Add the ketchup, brown sugar, mustard, Worcestershire sauce and garlic powder. Stir gently, but thoroughly, until the ingredients are mixed well.
Bake the beans 30-35 minutes or until the mixture is bubbly and the onion and pepper are tender. Serve at once or cover with foil and leave in the oven (turned off) until ready to serve.

title: Broccoli Casserole
steps: Melt butter, cook onion and broccoli till soft. Then put all ingredients in a bowl (cut up cheese) and mix. Put in casserole dish cook at 350 degrees 30 minutes. Do not cover casserole while cooking.

title: Caramelized Onion and Rice Tart
steps: Heat oven to 400 degrees. Coat 10 inch removable bottom tart pan with cooking spray.
In skillet on medium, heat butter or margarine. Add onions. Cook 10 minutes; sir in sugar. Cook 8-10 minutes or until onions are browned and caramelized; stir occasionally.
Combine rice, Parmesan and eggs. Spread evenly in tart pan. Distribute onions over crust and top with cheese and pecans. Bake 12-15 minutes or until pecans are toasted.

title: Cauliflower Crunch

ingredients.item: 10 oz Frozen cauliflower in cheese sauce, thawed

steps: Heat oven to 400 degrees. Heat 1 tbs of the oil in a medium skillet over medium heat until hot. Add tomatoes, garlic and green chilies. Cook 1 to 2 minutes or until thoroughly heated, stirring occasionally. Spread in bottom of ungreased 9 or 10 inch quiche dish or glass pie pan. Top with cauliflower in cheese sauce.
In a small bowl, combine crumbs, Parmesan and remaining 2 tablespoons of oil. Mix well. Sprinkle over cauliflower mixture.
Bake 20-22 minutes or until edges are bubbly and crumbs are golden.

title: Glazed Yams and Onions

ingredients.item: sized yams, cooked, peeled and halved
small white onions peeled and cooked

steps: Melt butter in large frying pan, stir in brown sugar, water and salt, heat slowly until sugar is melted.
Arrange potatoes and onions in pans, simmer, basting often until glazed to a rich golden color.

title: Golden Squash Bake

ingredients.item: Coarse salt, ground pepper to taste

steps: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Cut the squash into 1 inch cubes and place in a large bowl, Toss with the onions,garlic, coarse salt and pepper and 1/4 cup olive oil

Place the vegetables in a shallow baking pan to fit and bake until tender, tossing once or twice, about 1 1/4 hours. Transfer the mixture to a bowl, season generously with more salt and pepper, and drizzle with extra olive oil, if you like. toss with basil and serve immediately. Serve 4 to 6

title: Green Beans with Feta
steps: Press beans between paper towels to remove excess moisture.

In a large nonstick skillet, heat oil until hot. Cook garlic and Italian seasoning over medium heat 1 minute; add green beans and cook 5-7 minutes. Stir in tomatoes and cook, stirring constantly, 2 minutes or until thoroughly heated. Stir in lemon juice, salt and pepper. Sprinkle with cheese and pine nuts.
Toast pine nuts in a 350 degree oven for 6-8 minutes.

title: Honey Glazed Carrots
steps: Combine carrots and water in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil; cover, reduce heat, and simmer 8 minutes or until crisp tender. Drain and return to pan. Add honey and remaining ingredients; cook over low heat, stirring gently, until butter and sugar melt.

title: Hot Cabbage Creole
steps: Fry bacon in Dutch oven. Add onion and green pepper, saute till tender. Add remaining ingredients, cover, bring to boil. Reduce heat, simmer about 15 minutes.

title: Impossible Spinach Pie

ingredients.item: 10 oz frozen spinach, thawed and drained

steps: Heat oven to 400 degrees. Grease 10 inch pie plate. Mix spinach, cheese and onion in plate. Beat remaining ingredients until smooth, 15 seconds in blender on high or 1 minute with hand beater. Pour into plate. Bake until knife inserted in center comes out clean, about 30 minutes. cool 5 minutes. Serves 6

title: Maple Baked Onions
steps: Layer onions in a greased 13-inch x 9 inch x 2 in baking dish., Combine syrup and butter; pour over onions. Bake, uncovered at 425 degrees for 40-45 minutes or until tender.

title: Marinated Brussels Sprouts
steps: Cook Brussels sprouts according to directions; drain. Combine remaining ingredients; pour over sprouts and toss to coat. cover and refrigerate.

title: Marinated Carrots

ingredients.item: carrots, peeled and sliced into 1 inch lengths

steps: Bring the carrots with water to cover to a boil and boil 5 minutes; drain and cool. Into a medium bowl urn the salt, pepper and mustard; beat in a little oil to blend with the mustard; add he remaining oil and the sugar, vinegar and soup and beat again to blend. Stir in the onion and green pepper. Cover tightly and chill over night. Makes 12 to 16 servings. Recipe may be doubled. Any marinade left over may be refrigerated and used as a dressing for salad greens.

title: Oven Fried Eggplant
steps: Combine first four ingredients in shallow dish. Peel eggplant and cut into 1/4 inch slices. Spread both sides with mayo/dressing, dredge in crumbs, place on cookie sheet. Bake at 400 degrees for 10-12 minutes til golden brown.

title: Potatoes & Broccoli au Gratin
steps: Heat oven to 375 degrees. Coat 7 by 11 inch baking dish with cooking spray.

Cook potatoes in boiling water 15-20 minutes. Drain over a bowl to reserve 1 cup cooking liquid. Return potatoes and liquid to pan; mash until slightly chunky. Stir in broccoli, onion, ricotta, dill, salt, red pepper, sour cream. Spoon mixture into dish. Bake 35 minutes. Sprinkle with Cheddar cheese. Bake 5 minutes or until cheese melts.

title: Salsa Green Beans
steps: In a medium size saucepan over high heat, cover the green beans with water and bring to boil. Cook, uncovered, for about 8 to 10 minutes or until beans are crisp tender,
In a large nonstick skillet, saute the chopped sweet onions in butter or margarine until they are translucent and tender.
Drain the cooked beans.
In the same saucepan, combine the tomato wedges, prepared salsa, minced garlic, salt and cooked onions with the drained beans,
Heat through and serve.

title: Sesame Vegetables on the Grill
steps: Turn on grill to high.

Peel the onions and cut them in half. Slice each half into crescent shaped slices 1/4 inch thick. Place the slices into a large size foil grilling bag. Seed and rinse the bell pepper and cut it in half. Cut each half into 1/4 inch strips, and add them to the bag. Add the broccoli and mushrooms to the bag.

Pour the soy sauce and oil into a 2 cup glass measure and whisk to combine. Pour the mixture over the vegetables. Sprinkle in he sesame seeds. Fold the top of the bag to close it securely, and shake the bag to mix well.

Place the bag flat on the grill, making sure vegetables are evenly distributed, and cook until the broccoli is crisp tender, 8 to 10 minutes. Remove to a supporting pan, and use oven mitts to cut open foil bag wit a sharp knife. Carefully fold back top of foil bag allowing steam to escape. Serve at once.

title: Spinach Balls

ingredients.item: 10 oz. frozen chopped spinach, thawed, squeezed dry

steps: Thoroughly mix all ingredients together and shape into 1 inch balls. Place on ungreased baking sheet and bake at 350 degrees for 10 to 15 minutes

title: Squash with Cider Glaze
steps: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Into an oven proof baking dish that will comfortably hold squash, pour in enough water to reach a dept of 1 inch. Place squash halves cut side down in dish, Bake 15 minutes.
In a nonstick saucepan, combine cider, 1 cup water and vinegar. bring to a boil over high heat and, stirring occasionally, allow mixture to reduce to about half, about 12 minutes.

Remove squash from oven. Carefully turn cut-side up with tongs or tablespoons. Using fork,prick interior all over. With a small brush, coat inside of squash wit some of the cider mixture. Lightly sprinkle with salt and pepper. Return squash to oven to continue baking. Repeat brushing on cider mixture every 10 to 15 minutes until squash is almost fork tender, about 60 to 75 minutes, depending on oven and size of squash.

During the last minutes of baking; cook cider mixture over high heat until reduced to a thick, glazelike sauce, 5 minutes. When squash is fork tender, remove from oven. Carefully transfer to platter or plates. Brush squash with glaze, allowing a little to pool in the bottom of each cavity.

title: Vegetable Saute
steps: Heat: Garlic in oil. Add peppers, celery, and oregano. Cook til tender, add green beans, carrots heat till done.

title: Vidalia Casserole
steps: In a skillet over medium heat saute onions in butter until tender. Remove from the heat; stir in sour cream. Spoon half into a greased 1 quart baking dish. Sprinkle with cheese. Top with remaining onion mixture and crackers. Bake, uncovered at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes.

title: Winter Squash with Sage Butter
steps: Arrange oven rack in lower third of oven. Heat oven to 400 degrees. Line jellyroll pan with foil; set aside.

Cut squash into 2 inch thick pieces, discarding seeds; transfer to bowl. Add oil, 1/2 tsp salt and the pepper; toss. Arrange squash skin side down on prepared pan. Bake 30 minutes. Turn pieces over and bake until squash cab easily be pierced with a knife, 15 minutes more. Let stand until cook enough to handle. remove skin with small paring knife; transfer squash to bowl and gently stir with spoon until coarsely mashed.

Melt butter in a small skillet over medium heat. Add shallots; cook until they soften and just begin to color, 5 minutes. Stir in sage and cook 2 minutes more. Add sage-butter ad remaining 1 tsp salt to squash. Serves 8.

title: Zesty Carrots
steps: Cook carrots 5 minutes until crisp tender. Put carrots in casserole dish. Combine next 5 ingredients. Spread over carrots. Mix butter and crumbs, spread over carrots, sprinkle with paprika. Bake at 375 degrees 15 minutes.

title: Zucchini Casserole

ingredients.item: Zucchini, cut in half moons 1/2 inch thick

steps: Heat oven to 375 degrees.
Place bacon and onion in 6-8 quart pot on medium heat. Cook until light brown. Add garlic and cook 30 seconds.
Toss in zucchini and cook 2-3 minutes. Stir in chopped tomatoes and cook 2 minutes. Add oregano and tomato sauce and remove from heat.

Line bottom of 2 quart casserole dish with light layer of shredded mozzarella. Top cheese with half of zucchini mixture. Place more cheese on top and add rest of zucchini mix. Top with remaining mozzarella, bread crumbs and Parmesan. Drizzle 1 tablespoon of oil on top of cheese and bread crumbs.
Bake uncovered 1 1/2 hours or until hot and bubbly.

title: Zucchini or Summer Squash Casserole
steps: Boil together: 4 medium squash and 1/4 cup chopped onion then Drain.
Stir together and add to squash mixture the following: 1 can cream of chicken or mushroom soup and 1 pint of sour cream.
Mix together: 1 stick butter or margarine (melted) to 1 8 oz pkg Pepperidge Farm Herb Stuffing mix.
Spread half of stuffing mixture in bottom of casserole dish. Cover with squash, sour cream mixture and then top with remaining stuffing mix. Bake at 350 degrees for about 30 minutes.

title: 1-Minute French Dressing
steps: Combine and shake well.

title: Apple and Spinach Salad

ingredients.item: sweet tart apple, cored and thinly sliced

steps: Combine first 6 ingredients, stirring well with whisk.
