Combine onion, spinach, and apple in a large bowl. Drizzle with dressing, toss gently to coat. Sprinkle with cheese.

title: Baby Green Salad w/Bleu Cheese

ingredients.item: head iceberg lettuce, cut in bite size pcs
romaine heart, cut in bite size pcs

steps: Place greens in large bowl. Add nuts, berries and cheese. Drizzle oil over top. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Toss to coat.
Taste for seasonings and adjust as needed.
Drizzle vinegar over salad and toss to coat again.

title: Balsamic Vinaigrette w/Equal
steps: Whisk vinegar, Equal, mustard, salt and pepper in a small bowl until well blended. Whisking constantly, add oil in a slow steady stream until mixture is thickened and well combined. Serve over mixed greens.

title: Cold Spaghetti Salad
steps: Cook spaghetti. Cool. Mix all ingredients together. Add to spaghetti chill until ready to serve.

title: Cole Slaw
steps: Mix first 4 ingredients. Bring to a boil for 2 minutes. Cool
Mix all together and refrigerate overnite. Will keep for 10 days.

title: Davy's Locker House Dressing
steps: Blend all ingredients together in a medium sized mixing bowl; serve chilled.

title: Greens with Bacon Dressing
steps: Place greens in a salad bowl. Add onions and green pepper. Cut bacon into small pieces and fry bacon until crisp. Remove from pan and drain on paper towels.

Le bacon fat cool slightly. Add brown sugar and stir well. Add vinegar, Worcestershire, lemon juice and garlic salt. Stir and pour over the greens. Toss gently. Garnish with bacon pieces and hard cooked eggs. Makes 6 servings.

title: Icebox Vegetable salad
steps: Combine all vegetables in a large glass bowl; set aside. In a saucepan, combine sugar, vinegar, oil, salt and pepper; bring to a boil. Cool slightly and pour over vegetables. Cover and refrigerate overnight. Serves 6-8

title: Mattapoisett Inn French Herb Dressing
steps: Whisk together the olive oil and tarragon vinegar and add the remaining ingredients.

title: R. C. Shea's House Dressing
steps: Place oil, vinegar, lemon juice, onion, ketchup, mustard, salt, sugar and cayenne pepper in a bowl and beat at medium speed for 3 minutes. Add the mayonnaise and beat for 3 more minutes. Add poppy seeds, beat until blended, Makes about 2 cups.

title: Sauerkraut Salad

ingredients.item: 20 oz. sauerkraut drained and rinsed under water

steps: Mix above in a large bowl. Boil 1 cup sugar and 1/2 cup white vinegar, let cool. Add to above mixture. Let set, refrigerate overnight for more flavor.

title: Sauerkraut Salad II
steps: In a large bowl, mix sauerkraut, carrots, celery, green pepper, onion and pimientos. In a jar or small bowl, combine sugar and oil. Pour over vegetables and mix well, Cover and refrigerate for at least 8 hours.

title: Sour Cream Potato Salad
steps: Combine the first four ingredients. Set aside. Place half of potatoes in bowl, sprinkle with parsley and onion. Top with half of mayo mixture. Repeat with another layer. Cover and chill.

title: Taco Salad
steps: Cook hamburg accorading to Taco seasoning directions. Let cool. Mix cream cheese and sour cream for first layer, then layer hamburg, tomato, lettuce, Taco sauce and cheese.

title: Tomato Dijon Dressing
steps: Stir together all ingredients and chill overnight in a covered container.
HINT: For a more herbal finish, substitute tarragon vinegar and add 1/4 tsp dried tarragon.
Adding 1/4 cup of relish of your choice makes this a low calorie Russian style dressing.

title: Tossed Greek Salad
steps: In a salad bowl, combine the first seven ingredients. In a jar with a tight fitting lid, combine the dressing ingredients; shake well. Pour over salad and toss to coat. Serve immediately.

title: Waldorf Salad

ingredients.item: cooked chicken breasts, cooled and diced

steps: Combine dressing ingredients in a bowl.
On four salad plates, make bed of shredded romaine. Mix celery, apples, walnuts and diced chicken. Spoon onto lettuce. Drizzle dressing over top of each serving.
Garnish with fresh strawberries and serve with a fresh croissant.

title: Cantaloupe Soup
steps: Cut melon in half, remove seeds, peel and cut into 1 inch cubes. Combine half of melon and 1/2 cup of orange juice in blender, process until mix is smooth. (Repeat process until all of melon is processed). Combine with remaining orange juice and spices, blending well. Cover and chill.

title: Fruited Yogurt Soup
steps: Blend ingredients. Chilled at least 2 hours.

title: Lemon Chicken Rice Soup

ingredients.item: diced white meat from the whole chicken used to make stock

steps: Cook rice until tender. When cool add lemon juice.
Cook vegetables in chicken stock until tender. Add rice mixture, diced chicken and parsley, Season to taste with salt and pepper.

title: Manhattan Clam Chowder
steps: Cube bacon and brown in soup pan. Add potatoes and onions turn to glaze. Add green pepper and celery. Cook, stirring occasionally, to glaze. Add boiling water, tomatoes and paste, liquid drained from clams and thyme. Simmer about 5 minutes, until potatoes are tender. Add clams, heat briefly, season with salt and pepper. Makes 4-6 servings.

title: New England Clam Chowder - Maine Style
source_file: SSSSSSSSS/Soup/New England Clam Chowder - Maine Style.htm

ingredients.item: salt pork or 3 thick slices bacon diced

steps: Drain the clams. Strain the liquid through cheesecloth if sandy; save it for later. Chop the clams into medium size pieces.
Cook salt pork or bacon in a deep heavy pot until the fat is rendered.
Add the onions and cook, stirring until they start to turn golden.
Add diced potatoes, thyme and boiling water; cook about 10 minutes.
Add the clams, the milk and 1 1/2 tsp of the butter; cook about 15 minutes.

Heat the remaining butter; blend in the flour. Gradually add the clam liquid to this mixture and stir until smooth; then add the mixture to the chowder for the last 5 minutes of cooking. Just before serving. add the warmed heavy cream. Salt and pepper to taste.

title: Soupe au Pistou

ingredients.item: herbs de Provence or dried thyme and oregano leaves
fresh green beans cut in 1 in pieces

steps: In a large pot, heat oil over medium heat. Add onion, carrot, celery and leek. Reduce heat to low and saute for 10 minutes. Add water, broth, tomatoes, herbs, salt and pepper. Simmer for 30 minutes. Add potato and cook for 5 minutes. Stir in green beans and cannelloni beans and cook until all vegetables are tender, about 8 minutes. Serve in bowls with a spoonful of Pistou.
FOR PISTOU: In a food processor, combine all ingredients. Process until pureed. If not using immediately, cover and refrigerate up to 5 days.

title: Spicy Potato Soup
steps: In a Dutch oven or large kettle, brown ground beef. Drain. Add potatoes, onion and tomato sauce. Stir in water, salt, pepper and hot pepper sauce; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour or until potatoes are tender and the soup thickened.

title: Apple Cobbler Topping
steps: Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat margarine with sugar in a large bowl till creamy. blend in egg and vanilla. Stir in flour, oats and cinnamon thoroughly.
Spoon crumbly mixture onto apple mixture. Bake at 350 for about 45 minutes

title: Appleless Apple Pie
steps: Mix water, sugar and cream of tartar. Drop in one at a time 22 Ritz crackers, bring to a boil for 2 minutes, (do not stir), let cool.
Make a crust and pour in filling, sprinkle with cinnamon and small pieces of utter, put top crust on and bake in 450 degree oven for 15 minutes and then lower oven to 350 and bake until brown.

title: Banana Cream Pie
steps: In heavy saucepan, dissolve cornstarch in water; stir in sweetened condensed milk and egg yolks. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly. Remove from heat; add margarine and vanilla. Cool slightly. Slice 2 bananas; dip in Realemon and drain. Arrange on bottom of prepared crust. Pour filling over bananas; cover. Chill 4 hours or until set. Spread top with whipped cream. Slice remaining banana; dip in Realemon, drain and garnish top of pie.

title: Banana Cream Pie

ingredients.item: whipped cream and banana slices for garnish

steps: Put whipping cream and half and half in bowl; blend in pudding mix. Whip at lowest speed on mixer. Add ice and continue mixing for 5 minutes. Increase to medium speed and mix another 5 minutes; turn mixer to high speed and mix until very stiff.
Line bottom of pie crust with slices from 1 banana
Fill pie shell with about half the prepared filling until level with top, and top with slices of the second banana.
Pile on the rest of the filling, shaping with spatula to form a high center cone. Refrigerate at least 1 hour until thoroughly chilled. Top with whipped cream and a few slices of bananas for garnish.

title: Berry Easy Dump Cake
steps: Heat the oven to 350 degrees. Grease a 13 by 9 by 2 in baking pan with butter or margarine. Spread the contents of 1 (21 oz) can of apple, blueberry, cherry, or strawberry pie filling evenly across he bottom of the prepared pan. Cover with the contents of 1 (20 oz) can crushed pineapple (undrained). Spread 1 box yellow cake, white or lemon cake mix (yep, just dry _ right out of the box). Dot the top of the cake mix with pieces of butter cut from one stick. Sprinkle the top with 3/4 to 1 cup coconut and 3/4 to 1 cup chopped nuts of choice. Bake for 30 minutes. Serve warm.

title: Bittersweet Topping for choc. cake
steps: Melt 3 oz semisweet chocolate bit, cool slightly. Whip 3/4 cup heavy cream stiff. Add cooled chocolate, fold into cream very lightly for mottled effect.

title: Black Bottom Goodies
steps: Combine frist 5 ingredients in large bowl, make well in center. Combine water, oil, vinegar and vanilla, add to dry ingredients, stirring well. Spoon batter into paper lined miniature muffin pans 2/3 full.
FILLING
Combine cream cheese and next 3 ingredients. Stirring well. Stir in chocolate chips. Spoon 1 teaspoon mixture into each. Bake at 350 degrees 10-15 min. Makes approx 5 dozen

title: Blueberry Dream
steps: Combine cracker crumbs and butter; stir well. Set aside 2 tablespoons crumb mixture. Press remaining crumb mixture into and ungreased 12 x 8 x 2 inch baking dish. Bake at 350 degrees for 8 minutes. Cool.
Place cream cheese in a large mixing bowl; beat at high speed of an electric mixer until fluffy. Add powdered sugar, and mix well. Set aside.

Combine whipped topping mix, milk and vanilla in large mixing bowl. Beat at high speed of electric mixer about 4 minutes or until topping is light and fluffy. Fold whipped topping into creamed mixture.

Spread half of whipped topping mixture over crust. Spoon pie filling over whipped topping mixture. Spread remaining whipped topping mixture over pie filling. Sprinkle reserved crumb mixture over top. Chill 8 hours. Yield: about 8-10 servings

title: Boston Cream Pie Loaf
steps: Slice pound cake into 3 layers using a long serrated knife. Place bottom layer on serving dish.
Spread evenly with 1 cup pudding. Top with middle layer of cake; spread with remaining pudding.
Top with remaining cake layer, cut side down. Spread with chocolate topping, pushing it gently over edges so topping drips down sides of cake. Serve immediately or refrigerate up to 3 days.

title: Bread Pudding

ingredients.item: day old bread cut into 1/2 inch cubes

steps: In large bowl cream together margarine, vanilla pudding and cinnamon til fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beat well after each. In another bowl combine milk, undrained pineapples, coconut, raisins and vanilla. By hand, blend mixture into creamed mixture, it will look curdled. Fold in bread cubes. Pour into ungreased 8 x 8 x 2 baking pan. Place baking dish into larger pan on oven rack. Pour hot water into larger pan to a depth of 1 inch. Bake at 325 degrees for about 1 hour to 1 1/4 hours till knife inserted in center comes out clean.

title: Bread Pudding I
steps: Combine sugar, salt, eggs and vanilla beating only until mixed. Sir in cold milk, bread cubes and hot milk. Mix well. Pour into buttered casserole. Bake in preheated slow oven 325 degrees for 1 1/2 hours or until a knife inserted into pudding comes out clean.

title: Broiled Bananas
steps: Mix sugar and juice. Coat sliced bananas. Place in ungreased dish and broil until sugar has turned to a glaze. 3-5 minutes. Serve with ice cream or sour cream.

title: Buttermilk Pie
steps: Cream butter; gradually add sugar, beating at medium speed of an electric mixer. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each. Add flour and nutmeg, beating at low speed until blended. Add buttermilk, beating well. Pour into pastry shell; bake at 325 degrees for 55 minutes or until pie is set. Cool on wire rack. Yield: one 9-inch pie.

title: Carrot Cake
steps: Combine carrots, eggs,sugar and oil. Add remaining ingredients (except cream cheese, powdered sugar and milk) and beat well. Pour into 2 oiled and floured 9 inch pans. Bake at 350 degrees for 40-45 minutes. Cool layers.
Frosting: Combine cream cheese and powdered sugar. (Add milk only to moisten and make easier to combine.)
Frost cooled layers.

title: Cheesecake
steps: Place ingredients in order given in a large mixing bowl. Beat with an electric mixer. Start on low speed move to medium and finish on high. Approximately 10 minutes total.

Batter should be smooth and liquid. Grease and flour a 10 inch round spring form pan. Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Pour batter into pan and bake 1 hour. turn oven off and leave cake in oven for another hour. Cool and refrigerate.

title: Choc. Six Layer Pastry Cake
steps: Combine first 4 ingredients in pan cook over low heat till smooth. Cool to room temperature.

Combine pie crust mix with 3/4 cup chocolate mix. Beat at medium until smooth. Divide into six portions. 1 portion on bottom of cake pan ungreased to 1/2 inch of outside of pan. Bake 2 at a time at 425 degrees for 5 minutes., Loosen and place on wax paper to cool. Beat whip cream to peaks, fold in remaining chocolate. Stack pastry and fill with cream mix. Chill 8 hours. Decorate.

title: Chocolate Amaretto Heavenly Tarts
steps: Melt chocolate in heavy saucepan over low heat; set aside.

Cream butter; gradually add powder sugar, beating at medium speed of an electric mixer until smooth. Add chocolate, mixing until blended. Add vanilla and salt; mix until blended. Add egg yolks, one at a time, beating after each addition. Add 3 tablespoons amaretto, 1 tablespoon at a time, beating well after each addition.
Beat whipping cream until soft peaks form. Gradually add 1 1/2 Tbsp amaretto; mix until blended. Fold 1 cup whipped cream mixture into chocolate mixture.
Fill cooled tart shells with chocolate filling. Chill 3 to 4 hours until firm. Pipe or dollop with reserved whipped cream. Garnish with sliced almonds if desired. Yield: 5 dozen tarts.
TART SHELLS

Crumble 33 vanilla wafers in container of a food processor; add 1 cup coconut, and process 5 seconds. Add 1/2 cup pecans; process 5 seconds. Transfer mixture to a large bowl, mixing vanilla wafers, coconut and pecans.
Pour melted butter over crumb mixture; toss lightly until well mixed. Spoon 1 tablespoon crumb mixture into miniature muffin pans. Press to form crust on bottom and sides.
Bake at 375 degrees for 8 to 10 minutes. Cool. Loosen tarts, and fill them in pan. Refrigerate if not served immediately.

title: Chocolate Baskets with Berry Cream
steps: Invert six 6-ounce custard cups; cover each with a paper baking cup then with heavy duty plastic wrap. Make sure paper cup stays in place. Place inverted cups on baking sheet. Coat with cooking spray.

Combine chocolate morsels and candy coating in a heavy saucepan; stir over low heat until melted. Remove from heat; let stand 10 minutes. Spoon into a decorating bag fitted with a small writing tip. (Or use a heavy duty zip top plastic bag, snipping a tiny hole in one corner.
Slowly drizzle chocolate over each cup. (If it drizzles too fast, let cool a little longer. If it becomes too firm to pipe, reheat it. Chill 10 minutes.

Pipe a second layer of chocolate; chill 1 hour. Carefully remove custard cups and paper cups from baskets, and gently peel away plastic wrap. Store in an airtight container in refrigerator until ready to serve.
Gently fold preserves and liqueur into whipped cream. Place chocolate baskets on plates; spoon cream mixture into cups. Arrange strawberries over cream mixture. Garnish, f desired; serve immediately.

title: Chocolate Caramel Pecan Cheesecake
steps: Combine milk and caramel in pan and melt over low heat. Pour over graham cracker crust. Spread pecans evenly over caramel.

Beat cream cheese at high speed till light and fluffy, gradually add sugar, mix well, add eggs one at a time, beating well. Stir in chocolate and vanilla. Beat until blended. Spoon over pecan layer. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
Remove from oven, run knife around edge of pan, cool on rack to room temperature. Remove from pan. Cover and chill for 8 hours. When ready to serve decorate with nuts, etc.

title: Chocolate Cheesecake Pie
steps: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Combine crumbs, sugar, cocoa and margarine; press firmly on to bottom and up side to rim of 9-inch pie plate. In mixer bowl, beat cheese until fluffy. Gradually beat in sweetened condensed milk then melted chocolate chips. Add eggs and vanilla; mix well. Pour into prepared crust. Bake 30 to 35 minutes or until center is set. Cool thoroughly. Garnish as desired. Refrigerate.

title: Chocolate Fudge Pie
steps: Whisk together eggs and sugar in a large bowl; add butter and next 4 ingredients, stirring until blended. Stir in pecans and spoon into a lightly greased 9 inch pie plate.
Bake a 350 degrees for 25-30 minutes. (Mixture will rise, then fall as it cools)
Dark Chocolate Sauce to Follow?

title: Chocolate Kahlua Pecan Pie
steps: In a small saucepan, bring corn syrup, brown sugar, and butter to a boil. Reduce heat; simmer for 2 minutes. Remove from the heat. Stir in chocolate until melted and smooth; cool slightly. In medium bowl,whisk eggs with Kahlua and vanilla. Slowly whisk in chocolate mixture. Stir in pecans. Pour into crust. Bake on bottom rack in 350 degree oven for 35 to 40 minutes or until knife inserted in center comes out clean. If crust begins to get to dark, cover outer edges with foil. Serve warm or at room temperature with Kahlua whipped cream. Store in refrigerator.
For Kahlua whipped cream in a small bowl, beat 1 cup whipping cream, 3 tablespoons powdered sugar and 1 tbs of Kahlua until soft peaks form. Store in airtight container in fridge.

title: Chocolate Lace Cups
steps: Beat yolks, add flavorings and melted chocolate to yolks, stirring well. Beat egg whites and cream of tartar (high) till frothy, gradually add sugar till peaks form and sugar dissolves. Stir 1/4 meringue into chocolate mixture, then fold meringue into chocolate mixture. Beat cream to form whipped cream and fold into chocolate mixture. Fill lace cups and chill for at least 2 hours.

To form lace cups melt 12 oz. pkg of semi sweet chocolate chips. Cool a little, pour into plastic bag and cut a pin hole in tip and proceed to form basket over paper cupcake cups covered with plastic wrap and a little butter spray, cool in refrigerator, fill with mouse and serve.

title: Chocolate Marshmallow Cookie Pie
steps: Microwave marshmallows and 2 tbs milk in medium microwave bowl on High 45 seconds. Stir. Marshmallows will be partially melted.) Refrigerate for 15 minutes to cool. Stir in 1 cup whipped topping.

Pour 2 cups milk into large bowl. Add pudding mixes. Beat with wire whisk 2 minutes. Let stand 1 minute or until thickened. Sir in remaining 1 1/2 cup whipped topping. Spoon into crust. Arrange cookies over pudding mixture. Spread marshmallow mixture over cookies.
Refrigerate 4 hours. Drizzle with chocolate topping before serving if you have any.

title: Chocolate Pecan Pie

ingredients.item: sweet baking chocolate broken in pieces

steps: Heat oven to 350 degrees,
Melt chocolate and butter in pan for 1 or 2 minutes, stir until is completely melted and blended.

Stir in sugar, corn syrup, eggs and vanilla until well blended. Stir in pecans. Pour into pie shell. Bake 50 minutes or until knife inserted halfway between center and edge comes out clean. Cool on wire rack. Serve with whipped topping.

title: Chocolate Silk Pie
steps: Cream butter; gradually add sugar, beating at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Stir in chocolate and vanilla. Add 1 egg, and eat 4 minutes; add remaining egg, and beat 5 minutes. Spoon mixture into graham cracker crust. Chill at lest 8 hours. Serve with a dollop of whipped cream. Yield: one 9 inch pie.
Graham Cracker Crust
Combine crumbs, sugar and melted butter. Mix well press mixture into 9 inch pie plate. Bake at 350 degrees for 8 minutes. Cool. Fill with mixture from above, chill etc.

title: Chocolate Sour Cream Cake
steps: Combine sugar, flour,soda in bowl, mix well, set aside. Combine water, butter, cocoa in pan bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Gradually stir in hot mixture to flour mix, stir well. Stir in eggs and sour cream, mix well. Pour into 13 x 9 x 2 greased and floured pan. Bake 350 degrees for 25-30 minutes. Frost.
Choc. Peanut Butter Frosting
Combine butter, milk, cocoa in pan, bring to boil, stirring constantly. Remove from heat add remaining ingredients. Beat at medium speed till smooth.

title: Chocolate Swirl Cheesecake
steps: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Lightly butter 8 inch springform pan.

Prepare crust. Mix all ingredients except butter in bowl. Drizzle butter over mixture and stir till crumbs are moist. Press over bottom and halfway up side of buttered pan. Bake 6 minutes. Let cool and refrigerate until cold.
Heat oven to 425 degrees.
Prepare filling. Melt chocolate in top of double boiler over boiling water.
Beat cream cheese and granulated sugar in mixing bowl till light and fluffy. Beat in eggs one at a time, then beat in vanilla. Divide batter in half.

Beat 1/3 cup sour cream, brown sugar and melted chocolate into 1/2 the batter. Beat remaining 2/3 cup of sour cream into second half. Pour chocolate batter into chilled crust. Gently pour white batter on top. Swirl batters with thin knife.
Bake cake 12 minutes. Reduce heat to 250 and bake till 1 inch circle in center of cake is barely soft 55-60 minutes. Let cool on wire rack , then refrigerate several hours or overnight.

title: Chocolate Upside Down Cake
steps: In a saucepan combine syrup and sugar, margarine and salt. Bring to a boil stirring until butter is melted. Stir in nuts. Pour into 9 x 9 in pan.
Mix cake mix as directed. Sprinkle tid bits over mixture in pan. Pour batter over tid bits. Bake 35-40 minutes.

title: Chocolate Walnut Tart
steps: Fit piecrust in 11-inch tart pan. Sprinkle chocolate and walnuts evenly over crust.
Melt butter. Beat in brown sugar, corn syrup, eggs and vanilla until smooth. Pour into pan.
Bake in lower third of 350 degree oven 30 minutes. Cool on rack. Serve with whipped if desired.

title: Christmas Pound Cake
steps: Cream together sugar and margarine, add eggs. Add flour and flavorings and mix thoroughly, add fruits and cuts (that have been dredged in flour). Bake at 325 degrees for 1 hour.
For glaze heat all ingredients until sugar melts, make holes in cake and drizzle on top and let soak in.

title: Coconut Cream Pie
steps: Combine 3/4 cup sugar, cornstarch, salt in sauce pan, gradually stir in milk. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly till thickened/bubbly. Cook 1 minute. Beat egg yolks, gradually stir about 1/4 of hot mixture into yolks, add to remaining hot mixture, stirring always. Cook 30 seconds. Remove from heat stir in butter, vanilla and 1 cup coconut. Pour into shell. Cool completely. Cover and chill 1-2 hours.
Beat whip cream on high speed till foamy. Add powder sugar, beat till peaks form. Pipe or decorate with cream, add toasted coconut.

title: Coconut Custard Pie
steps: Preheat oven to 425 degrees. Toast 1/2 cup coconut; set aside. Bake pastry shell 8 minutes; cool slightly. Meanwhile, in medium bowl, beat eggs. Add sweetened condensed milk, water, vanilla, salt and nutmeg; mix well. Stir in remaining 1/2 cup coconut. Bake 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees, bake 25 to 30 minutes longer or until knife inserted near center comes out clean. Cool. Chill if desired. Refrigerate leftovers.
For custard pie just eliminate the coconut

title: Coconut Pineapple Pie
steps: In a bowl,combine sugar and flour. Add the corn syrup, coconut, pineapple, eggs and vanilla; mix well. Pour into pastry shell. Drizzle with butter. Bake a 350 degrees for 50-55 minutes or until a knife inserted in center comes out clean. (Cover loosely with foil ot the top browns to quickly). Cool on a wire rack. Chill before cutting. Store in refriogerator.

title: Cranberry Pie
steps: Grease well a 10 inch pie plate. Spread cranberries on bottom. Sprinkle with 1/2 cup nuts and 1/2 cup sugar. Beat eggs well. Add 1 cup sugar until thoroughly mixed. Add flour, melted butter and shortening to eggs and sugar mixture. Beat well. Pour over cranberries. Bake in a slow oven 325 degrees for about 1 hour or until crust is golden brown.

title: Cream Cheese Frosting
steps: Cream all ingredients together to blend into smooth frosting.
Melted chocolate can be added to make a chocolate frosting.

title: Cream Cheese Party Cupcakes
steps: Beat cream cheese in large bowl until soft and creamy, gradually add sugar until light and fluffy, add eggs one at a time. Beat well after each egg. Add 1 1/2 tsp vanilla. Spoon mixture into paper cupcakes 3/4 full. Bake at 300 degrees for 30 minutes.
Combine sour cream with sugar and vanilla stirring well. Spoon 1/4 tsp sour cream mixture on each cupcake, add strawberry jam, cook 5 minutes more.

title: Cream Cheese Pastry Mini Shells
steps: Mix and stir all ingredients till well blended. Make into 3/4" balls. Press into miniature muffin pans to form shells. Bake at 400 degrees 10-12 minutes. Cool on racks. Fill with almost any filling, fruit, etc.

title: Cream Cheese Rollups

ingredients.item: vanilla extract or any other flavor

steps: Mix cream cheese with milk and extract. Cut crust off bread to make square. Spread a little cream cheese on each and roll up. Coat each roll with melted butter and roll in sugar/cinnamon mixture. Freeze before baking. Bake at 350 degrees for only a few minutes until lightly brown.

title: Creamy Chocolate Frosting
steps: Combine all ingredients in a medium bowl, stirring until frosting is of spreading consistency.

title: Creamy Chocolate Frosting
steps: Combine butter, cocoa, salt and vanilla. Add sugar and milk alternately, mixing until smooth and creamy.

title: Cupcake Surprises
steps: Prepare cake batter according to package directions; set batter aside.
Stir together cream cheese, sugar and egg. Stir in chocolate morsels and coconut.
Spoon cake batter evenly into 24 paper-lined muffin cups, filling each half full. Drop cream cheese mixture by rounded teaspoonfuls evenly into center of cupcakes.

Bake at 350 degrees for 19 to 22 minutes or until wooden pick inserted in center comes out clean. Cool cupcakes in pans on wire rack for 15 minutes. Remove cupcakes from pans and cool completely on a wire rack.

title: Devil Dog Filling
steps: Mix all ingredients together, beat for about 5 minutes until creamy.

title: Double Dark Decadent Brownie

ingredients.item: Karo Light or Dark Corn syrup

steps: Grease abd flour 9-inch layer cake pan. In large saucepan bring corn syrup and buter to a boil, stirring occasionally; remove from heat. Add chocolate; stir until melted. Add sugar; stir in eggs, one at a time, then vanilla, flour and nuts. Pour into pan. Bake in 350 degrees oven for 30 minutes or until tester inserted in center comes out clean. Cool in pan 10 minutes. Remove; cool compleltly on rack. Prepare glaze, pour on top and spread on sides. Let stand 1 hour. Serves 8.

Chocolate Glaze: In small saucepan melt 3 squares (3 oz) Semi Sweet Chocolate with 1 tablespoon butter or margarine over low heat, stirring often. Remove from heat. Stir in 2 tablespoons Karo Corn Syrup and 1 tsp milk.

title: E-Z 3 Step Cheese Cake
steps: Beat cheese, sugar, vanilla until well blended. Add eggs one at a time blend and mix well. Stir in chocolate chips.
Pour mixture into ready made Graham cracker pie crust. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 minutes, or until center is almost set. Cool. Refrigerate for 3 hours. Sprinkle with chocolate shavings.

title: Fat Free Frosting
steps: Beat milk and topping and pudding on low speed until blended and then on high fo 4-6 minutes until soft peaks form. Enough to frost a 13 x 9 cake, refrigerate.

title: Fluffy Chocolate Frosting

ingredients.item: Grand Marnier or other orange flavor liqueur

steps: All all ingredients in order in processor. Put cover on. Pulse 2-3 times. Process for 1 minute scraping sides.

title: Fresh Fruit Tarts
steps: In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar and salt. Cut in butter until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Add egg; mix with fork until blended. Shape dough into a ball. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour or until easy to handle.

Divide dough into six portions. Press each portion into a greased 4-1/2 inch tart pan. Bake at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes or until edges are lightly browned. Cool for 10 minutes before removing from pans to wire racks to cool completely.
In a small mixing bow, beat cream cheese until smooth. Beat in sweetened condensed milk and lemon juice. Spoon 2 rounded tablespoonfuls into each cooled tart shell,. Arrange berries over filling.
In a small saucepan, melt preserves over medium heat; stir until smooth. Brush over berries.

title: Frozen Mocha Cheesecake Loaf

ingredients.item: 14 oz fat fat free condensed milk

steps: Line a 9 inch by 5 by 3 inch loaf pan with heavy duty foil. In a small bowl, combine cookie crumbs and butter. Press firmly onto bottom and 1/2 inch up sides of prepared pan.
In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until light and fluffy. Add milk and vanilla; mix well. Fold in whipped topping. Spoon half of the mixture into another bowl and set aside.
Dissolve coffee granules in hot water; fold into remaining cream cheese mixture. Fold in chocolate syrup.

Spoon half other chocolate mixture over crust. top with half of the reserved cream cheese mixture. repeat layers (pan will be full). Freeze, uncovered, for 6 hours or until set. Cover and freeze until serving. Use foil to lift out of pan; cut into slices. Serves 12

title: Fruit Trifle

ingredients.item: peaches, sliced and dripped in orange juice

steps: In medium bowl pour half and half and pudding mix, gently beat about 2 minutes. Cover and refrigerate.
Reserve several strawberry slices. Mix strawberries, cantaloupe, peaches and blueberries. Cover and refrigerate.
Assemble shortly before you serve in a large glass bowl.

Cake first, fruit mixture and pudding mixture, do this twice, just before serving peel bananas and slice sprinkle with liqueur. Arrange around edge and put extra strawberries on the center. Serve at once.

title: Fruity Rice salad
steps: IN a mixing bowl, combine the first five ingredients; beat until smooth. Add the rice, peaches, grapes, celery and raisins; stir well. Cover and refrigerate for at least 6 hours. Just before serving, stir into he pecans.

title: German Nut Cake
steps: Mix together first 5 ingredients then add all other ingredients mixing well. Bake in a greased Tube pan for 1 hour at 350 degrees.
Serve with whipped cream

title: German Streusel Cake
steps: Prepare filling by mixing all ingredients together, should be crumbly.

Prepare cake mix. Pour half of cake mix in a 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan, sprinkle with some of filling mix, then layer of cake mix, then layer of crumb mix and bake at 350 degrees for 40 to 50 minutes or until toothpick comes out clean. Drizzle vanilla glaze on top when cool.

title: Graham Cracker Retirement Puffs
steps: Combine crumbs and flour, set aside. In saucepan over high heat, heat water, butter and salt until butter melts and mixture begins to boil. Quickly stir in crumb mixture beating vigorously until mixture leaves sides of pan in a ball. Add eggs one at a time beating until blended. Chill pan in ice water until cool. Drop batter on sheet in 6 mounds, swirling top of each.
Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Bake for 40 min. Turn off oven. With sharp knife make a small slit in each puff.
Cool. Cut off top of puffs with sharp knife.
Fill with your favorite creamy vanilla filling. I use cool whip and pudding.

title: Grape Nut Pudding
steps: Combine eggs, sugar, salt and vanilla. Add milk gradually mixing thoroughly.
Pour into custard cups. Sprinkle grape nut on custard mixture in cups and dot with butter.
Place cups in pan of hot water and bake in moderate oven 375 degrees for 25 minutes or until knife inserted in center comes out clean. Makes 6 servings.
NOTE butter maybe melted and combined with grape nuts before sprinkling on custard.

title: Hidden Frosting Carrot Zucchini Cake
steps: Grease and lightly flour an 8 x 8 x 2 inch baking pan; set aside. For filling, in a small mixer bowl combine cream cheese and 1/3 cup of the sugar. Beat with electric mixer on medium speed until fluffy. Add 1 egg and beat mixture until smooth and set aside.

In a large mixer bowl stir together biscuit mix, 1/2 cup sugar and spice. Add carrot and zucchini, oil, 2 eggs and vanilla. Beat on low speed for 30 seconds. beat on medium speed for 2 minutes. Pour half the batter into prepared pan. Spoon filling on top. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 35 to 40 minutes or until done. Cool on wire rack. To serve, sift powdered sugar over cake. Cut into squares.

title: Individual Cheese Cakes
steps: Mix al together and pour over vanilla wafers in cupcake tins.
Bake at 325 degrees 15 minutes. Cool, add spoonful of any fruit topping.

title: Jewish Coffee Cake
steps: Cream shortening, add ingredients one at a time. Use greased tub pan. Spread filling between layers and on top. Bake at 375 degrees about 45 minutes.

title: Lady Finger Cake
steps: Combine cream cheese and sugar.
In another bowl combine cream and confectioners sugar. Mix both together. Put Lady Fingers on bottom and sides of pan, pour mix on top and choice of topping. Refrigerate.

title: Light Chocolate Cake
steps: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Spray two 8 inch round pans with cooking spray. In bowl, stir flour, cocoa and baking soda. In saucepan, melt corn oil spread, stir in sugar. Remove from heat. Add milk, vinegar and vanilla to mixture in saucepan, stir. Add dry ingredients, whisk until well blended. Pour evenly into pans. Bake 20 minutes or until wooden pick inserted comes out clean. Cool. Fill and frost top. Refrigerate. 12 servings.
Light Cocoa Frosting
In small mixer bowl, stir together 1 envelope dry topping mix, 1/2 cup cold skim milk, 1 tbsp cocoa and 1/2 tsp vanilla extract. Beat on high speed of mixer about 4 minutes or until soft peaks form.

title: Light Gelatin Dessert
steps: Dissolve jello and sugar in boiling water. Add 1 cup well drained pineapples. Let stand until syrupy. Add 1 cup smallcurd cottage cheese and 1 cup heavy cream, whipped very stiff and fold in carefully. Let set.

title: Million Dollar Pie
steps: Mix all together and put into pie crust. Set overnight in refrigerator.

title: Miniature Coffee Cakes
steps: Mix dry ingredients together. Cream butter and add sugar gradually. Beat till fluffy. Add egg and vanilla, beat well. Ads sour cream and flour alternately. Stir in raisins (?). Fill muffin tins (greased) 2/3 full. Add topping. Bake at 425 degrees 15-20 minutes.
For topping add all topping ingredients together sprinkle on top, and bake.

title: Molten Chocolate Cakes
steps: Preheat oven to 425 degrees. Butter 4 (3/4 cup) custard dishes. Place on baking sheet.

Melt chocolate and butter over a double boiler or microwave Stir with wire whisk until all is melted. Stir in sugar until well blended. Whisk in eggs and egg yolks. Stir in flour. Divide batter evenly to all custard cups.
Bake 13 to 14 minutes or until sides are firm but centers are soft. Let stand 1 minute. Carefully run knife around cakes to loosen. Invert cakes to dessert dishes. Serve with whipped cream topping.
Batter can be made a day ahead. Pour into prepared custard cups. Cover with plastic wrap. Refrigerate. When ready. Bake as directed.

title: Muriel's Chocolate Pie
steps: Mix everything together in double boiler until chocolate is melted, pour into shell, sprinkle coconut on top and bake at 400 degrees for 35-40 minutes. Serve warm or cold. Refrigerate leftovers.

title: Nana's Prune Cake

ingredients.item: prunes, pitted and cut in pieces

steps: Stir together flour, salt, baking soda and spices. Set aside. In a large mixing bowl beat together the corn oil and sugar, add eggs, one at time beating well after each addition, stir in vanilla. Add sifted dry ingredients alternately with buttermilk about 1/3 at a time, blending well after each addition, stir in prunes and nuts. Pour into greased and floured tube or bundt pan. Bake in oven at 350 degrees until cake tester comes out clean, about and hour. About 15 minutes before cake is done start preparing glaze.
GLAZE

In a 3 quart sauce pan put all ingredients in and cook up to a boil for 10 minutes. Stirring occasionally. When the cake is done and removed from oven . . pour warm glaze over the cake in the pan allow to soak into cake and cool completely before removing from pan.

title: No Roll Pastry Shell
steps: sift dry ingredients into pie pan. Combine oil and milk in measuring cup. Whip with fork and pour all at once over flour mixture. Mix with fork until flour is completely dampened. Press evenly and firmly over bottom and sides of pan.

title: Orange Chocolate Cheesecake
steps: CRUST: Combine crumbs, sugar and spices, cut in butter until completly blended, Press mixture on bottom and sides of pan. Chill.

CHEESECAKE: Melt chocolate. Meanwhile blend cream cheese and sugar until creamy and light. Add egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition, stir in vanilla,. orange peel and juice. Beat egg whites until stiff, spoon onto cheese mixture. Whip cream,fold with egg whites into cheese mixture until well blended. Spoon 1/3 of filling into crumb lined pan, trickle a little melted chocolate over surface swirl lightly. Repeat twice. Bake in very slow oven 300 degrees 1 hour. turn heat off, leave cake in oven with door closed 1 hour longer. Remove from oven, cool at room temperature, then chill.

title: Orange Sour Cream Dip for Fruit
source_file: Desserts/PiesCakes/Orange Sour Cream Dip for Fruit.htm
steps: In a medium bowl combine orange juice and milk. With electric mixer beat in pudding on low speed 2 minutes. Stir in sour cream.
Cut pineapple in half lengthwise, remove fruit. Cut all fruit into bite size pieces.
Put dip into pineapple boats and use wooden picks for the fruit.

title: Peaches and Cream Cheese Cake

ingredients.item: 3.2 oz Dry Vanilla Pudding mix not instant

steps: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease bottom and sides of 9 inch or 10 inch deep pie pan.
Combine first 7 ingredients in large mixing bowl, beat for 2 minutes at medium speed, pour into pie pan.
Place can of well drained peaches or pineapple over batter.
Combine cream cheese,sugar and 3 tbs reserved juice in a bowl. Beat at medium speed for 2 minutes. Spoon to within 1 inch of edge of batter.
Combine sugar and cinnamon to sprinkle over cheese filling.
Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes until crust is golden brown. Filling will appear soft. Store in refrigerator.

title: Peanut Butter Dessert

ingredients.item: cream filled chocolate sandwich cookies, crushed

steps: Combine cookie crumbs and butter, and reserve 1/4 crumb mixture. Press into bottom of a 13 x 9 2 inch pan. Bake at 375 degrees for 5 minutes. Let cool on a wire rack for 15 minutes.

Combine pudding mix and milk; beat with wire whisk until smooth. Add peanut butter, beating with whisk until smooth and thickened. Fold in whipped topping. Spoon over crumb crust, and sprinkle with reserved crumb mixture. Cover and chill at least 3 hours.

title: Peanut Butter Pie
steps: Combine cream cheese and peanut butter, beat at medium speed till light and fluffy. Gradually add whipped topping and sugar, beat till smooth. Spoon filling into shells. Freeze 8 hours. Garnish with chocolate

title: Peanut Butter-Jelly Cake
steps: Cream margarine and peanut butter, gradually add sugar, beat at medium speed until light and fluffy. Add 1 egg at a time and beat each till blended. Combine flour, salt and baking powder. Add to cream mixture alternately with milk . . . end with flour. Stir in vanilla. Pour into 2 greased and floured 9 inch pans. Bake a 350 degrees 30-35 minutes. Cool in pans 10 minutes. Remove and place on wire racks. Spread jelly between layers, then frost.
FROSTING
Cream margarine and peanut butter till fluffy add vanilla, mix well. Add sugar to mixture with milk beat until smooth to spread.

title: Perfect Pie Crust
steps: Mix dry ingredients together. Mix the wet ingredients together. Add wet to dry. Divided into 5 parts. Flatten and get dough ready to roll. Wrap in plastic or wax paper and chill at least 1/2 hour before rolling.

title: Perfectly Chocolate Cake
steps: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Grease and flour two 9" round pans. Combine dry ingredients in large bowl. Add egg, milk, oil and vanilla. Beat for 2 minutes on medium speed. Stir in boiling water. (Batter will be thin) Pour into pans. Bake 30-35 minutes. Cool 10 minutes. Remove from pans to wire racks. Cool completely. Frost. 10-12 servings.
FROSTING
Melt butter. Stir in cocoa. Alternately add powdered sugar and milk, beating on medium speed to spreading consistency. Add more milk, if needed. Add vanilla.

title: Pie Crust
steps: Combine flour and salt; cut in shortening with pastry blender until mixture resembles coarse meal. Sprinkle cold water (1 tablespoon at a time) evenly over surface; stir with a fork until dry ingredients are moistened. Shape into a ball; chill. Yield: pastry for one double crust 9-inch pie.

title: Pineapple Cheese Pie
steps: makes 2 pies

title: Praline Wafer Dessert
steps: Arrange 21 whole vanilla wafers in the bottom of a 9-inch spring pan. Cut a slight portion off of each remaining cookie so that it can stand against outer edge of pan.

Combine coconut, pecans, brown sugar and butter or margarine in a skillet. Cook over low heat stirring constantly until butter or margarine is melted. Continue to cook and stir until mixture browns lightly (about 5 minutes). Pour onto a baking sheet to cool. Break the coconut mixture into coarse crumbles. Reserve 1/2 cup. Sprinkle remaining crumbs over wafer base.

Prepare pudding with milk as directed on the label. Fold in whipped cream. Turn into pan spreading it gently to the edges of the standing wafers. Sprinkle with reserved crumbs. Chill 4 hours or overnight. Cut in wedges to serve. 6-8 servings.

title: Pudding Cake
steps: Mix cake mix and pour into 13 x 9 inch pan. Bake 20-25 minutes. Cool. Mix pudding using a little less milk than called for. Blend pudding and cream cheese until smooth, spread over cooled cake, spread pineapple over all, spread cool whip over that, spread walnuts over cream dot with cherries.

title: Pumpkin Chiffon Pie

ingredients.item: each ginger, nutmeg, cinnamon and salt

steps: Place pumpkin in top of double boiler, add beaten egg yolks, karo, milk,spices and salt. Cook over boiling water until custard consistency,stirring constantly. Remove from heat. To hot custard add gelatin which has been softened in cold water. Stir until gelatin is dissolved. Cool. When mixture begins to thicken, ea egg whites until stiff, beat in sugar. Gently fold into slightly thickened pumpkin mixture. Pour into shell and chill until firm. Decorate with whipped cream.

title: Red Velvet Cake
servings: Makes 2 layers, grease and flour pan
steps: Cream shortening and sugar, 2 eggs. Add cocoa and coloring in cup, add to . Sift flour and salt together, add buttermilk, folding. Add soda and vinegar in a cup. Fold in, add vanilla. Bake 20 to 30 minutes at 300 degrees. Makes 2 layers, grease and flour pan.
FROSTING: Cream 2 sticks butter, 1 tsp vanilla, add 1 cup sugar. Whip until fluffy. Cook 1 cup water and 12 tbs of cornstarch until thick.
Cool thoroughly and mix above and beat until looks like whipped cream.

title: Ricotta Cheese Filling

ingredients.item: dry non dairy whipped topping mix

steps: Process cheese in blender till smooth. Place in bowl add dry whipped mix and sugar and extract (liqueur) beat with mixer till smooth and well blended. Can add dry fruit, nuts, chocolate chips, etc

title: Rocky Road Frosting
steps: In a small saucepan place chocolate, 1 cup marshmallows, water and butter. Heat over low heat, stirring until blended. Cool slightly. Add sugar and vanilla, beat until smooth and slightly thick. Stir in reserved marshmallows and nuts. Frost 2 8 inch layers.

title: Royal Blueberry Cheesecake
steps: Mix all crust ingredients. Place 1/2 cup mixture in a heavily greased spring form pan 9 or 10 inches. Turn pan on side pressing mixture up sides of pan and then coat the bottom, continue until all of pan is coated. Bake 10 minutes at 350 degrees. Cool
Place blueberries in bottom of pan Using medium speed on mixer blend all ingredients except blueberries together.
Pour into pan and bake 30 minutes at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
Mix together 1 pint sour cream, 1 tsp vanilla, 1/4 cup sugar, and pour over hot cake. Bake 10 minutes more. Cool overnight before removing from pan.

title: Self-Filled Cupcakes
steps: Prepare cake mix according to package. Spoon batter into muffin tins with paper cups. Combine cream cheese and sugar, cream until light and fluffy. Add egg and salt beat well. Stir in chocolate chips. Spoon 1 tsp cream cheese mixture into center of each cupcake. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes. Cool in pan 10 minutes remove to wire rack.

title: Sex in a Pan
steps: Mix flour, margarine and nuts or heath bits together to form crust. Pat into a 13 x 9 pan. Bake at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes. Stays pale. Cool
Mix pudding with milk and beat until thickens and spread over crust.
Mix cream cheese, cool whip and powdered sugar until smooth. Spread on top of pudding. Set in refrigerator until needed.

title: Sin Cake
steps: Bake cake as directed. Prepare pudding as directed. Break up cake into pieces once cooled and place half of the pieces in a large glass bowl. Pour half the Kahlua over cake, and then put half the pudding over that. Top with half the cool whip. Repeat for next layers. Finally add crumbled heath bar to top. Keep chilled.

title: Snickers Pie
steps: Mix all together (pudding is dry) Spread into pie plate and freeze.

title: Snowballs

ingredients.item: 3 1/2 oz flaked coconut or ground nuts

steps: Combine chocolate and milk in double boiler, heat over hot water until chocolate is melted, stirring to blend. Remove from heat, stir in confectioners sugar and nuts. Cool slightly then form into 1 inch balls roll into coconut or nuts.

title: Soft Frosting
steps: Put cup of milk in pan over low heat, add wondra flour stirring until sauce thickens. Set aside to cool.
Cream butter, crisco an sugar. Blend well. Add milk mixture,beat until well mixed. Add vanilla. Continue beating until like whipped cream.
Refrigerate until needed.

title: Sour Cream Cheesecake
steps: Beat cream cheese in bowl until soft, add eggs and sugar. Beat until smooth. Pour into pie shell and bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
Combine sour cream, sugar and vanilla in a small bowl. Spread over baked cheesecake. Bake again for 5 minutes. Cool then refrigerate.

title: Sour Cream Cranberry Cake

ingredients.item: brown sugar and cinnamon to taste

steps: Cream margarine and sugar. Add eggs one at a time. Sift dry ingredients together and add to creamed mixture with sour cream ending with flour mixture. Stir in vanilla. old in one cup of cranberries. Pour half of the batter into greased 10 inch tube pan, cover with remaining batter. Sprinkle lightly with brown sugar and cinnamon. Bake at 325 degrees for one hour.

title: Special Rice Dessert (make a day ahead)
source_file: Rice/Rice/Special Rice Dessert (make a day ahead).htm
steps: Put rice and sugar in saucepan with water, (plenty of it) boil until cooked. Fold in pineapple and refrigerate until next day.
Whip cream with vanilla, fold cream into rice, fold in cherries.

title: Strawberry Dream Tart (Pizza)
steps: Beat cream cheese at medium speed with an electric mixer until smooth. Add next 3 ingredients; beat until smooth. Chill 5 minutes; fold in whipped topping.
Spread filling over Brown Sugar Crust; arrange strawberries over filling. Chill at lest 30 minutes before slicing. Yield: one 12-inch tart.
To Make Crust

Crush corn flakes; set aside. Beat butter and brown sugar at medium speed with an electric mixer until fluffy; add egg yolks, salt and almond extract, beating until smooth. Gradually add flour and cereal. Shape mixture into a ball; press into a well buttered 12-inch pizza pan. Bake at 375 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes or until golden brown. Cool completely. Yield: one 12 inch crust.

title: Swedish Apple Pie
steps: Butter well a 9 inch pie plate. Fill with apple filling, sprinkle with tsp sugar and cinnamon, set aside
In a saucepan, melt butter, add sugar, flour, 1 egg unbeaten, pinch of salt, raisins or nuts. Mix well pour over apples. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes. Serve with ice cream or

title: Sweet Chocolate Pie
steps: Melt chocolate and 2 tablespoons of the milk in pan until melted.

Beat in cream cheese, sugar and remaining milk with wire whisk until blended. Refrigerate about 10 minutes to cool. Gently stir in 3 1/2 cups of the whipped topping until smooth. Spoon into crust. Freeze 4 hours. Let stand at room temperature 15 minutes before cutting pie. Serve with remaining whipped topping. Store leftovers in freezer.

title: Too Good Frosting
steps: Process all ingredients in food processor until well blended. Frost a 13 x 9 in apple, banana, or spice cake

title: Triple Chocolate Brownie Pie
steps: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Grease 8-inch pie plate. In small mixer bowl, beat eggs; blend in sugar and butter, In separate bowl, stir together flour, cocoa and salt; add to egg mixture, beating until blended. Stir in chocolate chops, nuts and vanilla. Spread batter into prepared pie plate. Bake 35 minutes or until set (pie will not test done in center). Cool completely; cut into wedges. Serve with ice cream; top with your favorite chocolate syrup.

title: Tunnel of Fudge Cake
steps: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Grease and flour 12-cup Bundt pan.

In bowl,combine sugar and margarine; beat until light and fluffy, Add eggs 1 at a time, beating well after each addition. gradually add 2 cups powdered sugar; blend well. By hand, stir in flour and remaining cake ingredients until well blended. Spoon batter into greased and floured pan; spread evenly.
Bake at 350 for 45-50 minutes or until top is set and edges begin to pull away from sides of pan. cool upright in pan on wire rack 1 1/2 hours. Invert onto serving plate; cool at least 2 hours.
Combine glaze ingredients, adding enough milk for drizzling consistency. Spoon over cake, allowing to run down sides.

NOTE: The dessert develops a fudgey filling as it bakes. Don't scrimp on nuts, or it won't work. Because of the soft filling, an ordinary doneness test can't be used. Accurate temperature and baking times are essential.

title: Upside Down Cake
steps: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Sift flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt into bowl. Add shortening, milk, and flavoring. Beat 2 minutes on medium speed of mixer. Scrape sides and bottom of bowl constantly. Add eggs. Beat 2 more minutes. Melt butter in square pan, mix in brown sugar. Arrange fruit on top. Pour cake batter over fruit. Bake 40 to 45 minutes. Invert at once on serving plate. Leave pan over cake for a minute.

title: Wacky Cake
steps: Into an ungreased 9 inch pan sift first five these things together.
Spread mixture in pan and make holes, add the next three ingredients to pan
Pour 1 cup of cold water over all and mix with fork. Bake at 350 degrees for 30-40 minutes.

title: 100 Year Od Cookies
steps: Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
Mix all ingredients together thoroughly. Chill dough. Bake on greased cookie sheet.

title: Almond Shortbread Cookies
steps: Place oven rack in middle of oven. Heat oven to 350 degrees.

Combine flour and nutmeg. Whip butter, shortening and extracts. Gradually add sugar to the butter mixture, blending until mixture is light. Blend in flour. Dough should be slightly moist. If dough looks dry,sprinkle with water and work into dough, If dough is too sticky, sprinkle with additional flour. Chill dough.
Spoon dough by teaspoons to form balls. Place on ungreased baking sheet, pressing each with palm of your hand.
Cut each cherry into 5 pieces. Place fruit piece in center of each cookie. Bake 20 minutes. cool on wire rack.

title: Beacon Hill Cookies
steps: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Lightly grease baking sheets. Beat egg whites, vinegar and sat on a large bowl with an electric mixer on high speed until foamy. Add the sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, beating well after each addition. Continue to beat until they are thick and glossy. Stop the mixer and add the chocolate, vanilla and nuts. Fold in with a rubber spatula. Drop batter by spoonfuls onto prepared baking sheets. Bake until set, about 10 minutes. Carefully remove from baking sheets and transfer to a wire rack to cool completely, then store in airtight containers.

title: Big Brownie Oatmeal Drops

ingredients.item: brownie mix with syrup pouch 1 lb.

steps: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Lightly grease cookie sheets. Mix all ingredients until well blended. Cover and let stand 30 minutes for oats to absorb liquid. Drop rounded tbsp 1 1/2 inch apart on cookie sheets. Bake 10 to 12 minutes until tops look crackled and satiny. Remove with spatula to a wire rack to cool. Makes about 32 cookies. Edges are crunchy centers are soft.

title: Brownies
steps: Cream 1/2 cup butter (1 stick), add 1 cup sugar. Mix in 2 eggs (eaten lightly). Add 1 tsp vanilla. Stir in 2/3 cup sifted flour, 1/2 tsp baking soda, add 2 squares bitter chocolate (melted) and 2/3 cup chopped nuts
Use 8 in square pan, lined with wax paper. Bake at 325 for 35 minutes.

title: Carrot Bars
steps: Beat eggs until light, gradually beat in sugar. Alternately add salad oil and flour sifted with baking soda and cinnamon and salt. Mix well, fold in carrots, nuts, coconut. Spread evenly in 2 greased 12 x 9 x 2 inch pans. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes.

title: Cheese Brownies
steps: Melt chocolate and 3 tbs butter over very low heat, stiring constantly. Cool. Cream remaining butter with cream cheese until softened. gradually add 1/4 cup sugar, creaming until light and fluffy, Blend in 1 egg, 1 tbs flour and 1/2 tsp vanilla. Set aside.

Beat remaining eggs until thick and light in color. Gradually add remaining 3/4 cup sugar beating until thickened. Add baking powder, salt and remaining 1/2 cup flour. Blend in cooled chocolate mixture, nuts, extract and remaining tsp vanilla. Measure 1 cup chocolate and set aside.

Spread remaining chocolate batter in greased 9 inch square pan. top with cheese mixture. Drop measured chocolate batter from tbs onto cheese mixture, swirl with spatula to marble. Bake at 350 degrees for 35 to 40 minutes. Cool, cut, cover and store in refrigerator.

title: Chocolate Bit Cookies
steps: Beat all ingredients until smooth. Add chocolate bits. Bake at 350 for 10-15 minutes.

title: Chocolate Bliss Cookies

ingredients.item: peanuts or walnuts or pecans chopped

steps: Melt chocolate in microwave or on stove top till smooth and well blended in sugar, butter, eggs and vanilla with wooden spoon until well blended. Stir in flour and baking powder. Stir in chocolate chunks and nuts. Drop by 1/4 cupfuls onto ungreased cookies sheets. Bake at 350 degrees for 13 to 14 minutes or until cookies are puffed and feel set to the touch. Cool 1 minute, remove to wire rack to cool further. Makes about 18 large cookies. If omitting nuts, increase flour to 3/4 cup to prevent spreading.

title: Chocolate Cheese Squares
steps: Crust: blend margarine flour and nuts altogether. Roll out and place in pan and up the sides of the pan. (9 x 13 x 2 pan)
Bake at 400 degrees for 20 minutes. Set aside to Cool
Blend both packages of cheese and confectioners sugar together. Mix in cool whip. Then fill crust with mixture.
Blend 2 packages instant chocolate pudding, 3 cups milk, beat well. Pour over cream cheese mixture and let it set for a few hours.
Spread remaining cool whip on top of pudding mixture.
When cool and set cut into bars and enjoy.

title: Chocolate Chip Bars
steps: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Mix all ingredients in a bowl till well blended. Transfer to ungreased 8 x 8 or 9 x 9 pan. Cook about 40 minutes or until cake is done. Cut into bars when cooled.

title: Chocolate Chip Squares

ingredients.item: Choc. Chip Pillsbury Refrig. Cookie dough

steps: Grease a 13 x 9 pan.
Slice 1 roll of cookie dough thinly (1/4 inch wide). Lay in bottom of pan very close to form bottom of squares.
Mix softened cream cheese, eggs, sugar and vanilla . Beat until smooth. Spread over layer of cookie dough in pan. Sprinkle nuts over mixture.
Slice second roll of cookie dough thinly and lay very close each other over ingredients in pan. If any cookie dough is left fill in spaces between slices.
Bake at 350 degrees approximately 45 minutes.
Slice into squares when cool.

title: Chocolate Peanut Butter Drop Cookies
steps: In a large bowl at low speed, beat 1 tbs water and all ingredients except tid bits until mixed, increase speed to medium and beat 2 minutes,scrape bowl add tid bits. Drop by spoonfuls about 2 inch apart. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes.

title: Chocolate Pecan Thumbprints

ingredients.item: plus 1 tablespoon butter (no substitutes), softened, divided
finely chopped pecans 3/4 cup semisweet chocolate

steps: In a mixing bowl, cream 1/2 cup butter and brown sugar. Beat in egg yolk and vanilla. Gradually add flour; mix well. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours or until easy to handle.

Roll dough into 1-in. balls. Dip in egg white, then coat with pecans. Place 2 in. apart on greased baking sheets. Using the end of a wooden spoon handle, make a 1/2-in. indentation in the center of each ball. Bake at 325 derees for 10 minutes. Press again into indentations with the spoon handle. Bake 10-15 minutes longer or until pecans are golden brown. Remove to wire racks to cool.
In a microwave-safe bowl, heat the chocolate chips and remaining butter until melted; stir until blended and smooth. Spoon into cooled cookies.
Yield: about 1-1/2 dozen.

title: Chocolate Refrigerator Bars
steps: Grease 9-inch square pan

Melt margarine, sugar, in small saucepan over low heat until smooth. Stir in cocoa, egg and vanilla. Cook until mix thickens, stirring constantly. Remove from heat, stir in coconut, nuts and crushed crackers. Press mixture into pan, refrigerate 1 hour.
Butter Icing:
1/4 cup margarine, 1 3/4 cups powder sugar, sifted, 1 egg.
In a small bowl beat butter, powdered sugar and egg until smooth. Spread over refrigerated mixture. Chill until firm. Cut into bars.
Chocolate Topping:
6 oz. semi sweet chocolate, 1 tbsp butter. Melt chocolate and butter until smooth. Swirl over refrigerated mixture.Refrigerate for 3 to 4 hours. Cut into bars.

title: Coconut Pecan Cookies

ingredients.item: 24 oz semi sweet chocolate chips divided

steps: For frosting, in a saucepan, combine the egg, milk, sugar and butter. Cook and stir over medium-low heat for 10-12 minutes or until slightly thickened and mixture reaches 160 degrees. Stir in coconut and pecans. Set aside.

In a mixing bowl, cream butter and sugars. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in vanilla. Combine the flour, baking soda and salt; gradually add to creamed mixture. Stir in 2 cups chips and coconut. Drop by tablespoonfuls 2 inch apart onto ungreased baking sheets. Bake at 350 degrees for 8-10 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool for 10 minutes before removing to wire racks to cool completely.
In a microwave, melt the remaining chocolate chips; stir until smooth. Frost cooled cookies, then drizzle with melted chocolate,

title: Congo Squares
steps: Sift flour, baking powder and salt. Melt shortening, add sugar. Cool slightly, add eggs, one at a time, beat well. Add dry ingredients, nuts and chocolate. Bake a 350 degrees for 25-30 minutes.

title: Cranberry Squares
steps: Mix all and fold in 2 cups whole cranberries and 1 cup nuts. Grease a 9 x 13 inch pan , pour in mixture. Bake at 350 degrees for about 50 minutes.

title: Crunchy Lace Cookies
steps: STIR together 2 tablespoons hot water and baking soda in a large bowl until baking soda is dissolved. Add butter and syrup, stirring until blended.
COMBINE 1 1/2 cups oats and next 3 ingredients; stir into butter mixture, stirring until blended.
SHAPE dough into 3/4 inch balls, and place 3 inches apart, onto lightly greased baking sheets. Slightly flatten dough balls.
BAKE at 350 degrees for 7 to 8 minutes or until golden brown. Remove to wire rack to cool.

title: Easy Cheesy Lemon Bars
steps: Preheat oven top 350 degrees. Grease and flour pan.
In a large bowl, combine all base ingredients at low speed until crumbly, press in pan.
In small bowl combine frosting, cream cheese and egg a low speed until well blended, beat at highest speed until smooth.
Stir in nuts, spread over base.
Bake at 350 degrees 40 to 50 minutes or until firm.
Chill 2 hours before serving. Cut into bars.

title: Fig Squares
steps: Figs must be ground before cooking. Cook in double boiler night before. Cook until thick.

title: Good Cookies
steps: Melt butter/margarine/sugar, bring to a boil. Boil slowly for 3 minutes to form syrup.
Spray cookie sheet with pam, place saltines on sheets. Pour butter on crackers. Put nuts on. Bake at 350 degrees for 7 to 8 minutes.
Cool then break apart and store.

title: Greek Squares

ingredients.item: butter melted in bottom of pan

steps: Mix in bowl and put in 8 x 9 pan 350 degrees for 30 minutes

title: Heavenly Hash
steps: Butter sides and bottom of a square pan.
Melt chips, blend in condensed milk and vanilla. Mix well. Remove from heat.
Stir in marshmallows, nuts and cereal, mix until coated.
Refrigerate until firm. Cut into squares. Keep refrigerated.

title: Jeweled Coconut Drops
steps: In a large mixing bowl, cream the butter, cream cheese and sugar. Beat in egg yolk, orange juice and almond extract. Combine the flour, baking powder and salt; gradually add to creamed mixture. Stir in 3 cups of coconut. Refrigerate for 30 minutes or until easy to handle.

Shape dough into 2-inch balls; roll in remaining coconut. Place 2 inch apart on ungreased baking sheets. Using the end of a wooden spoon handle, make an indentation in the center of each ball. Bake at 350 degrees for 8-210 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove to wire racks to cool. Fill each cookie with preserves. Melted chocolate chips or any other filling can be used to fill hole. Yield about 42 cookies.

title: Macaroon Cookies

ingredients.item: chocolate or jams or jellies to fill

steps: Beat butter, cream cheese and sugar in large bowl until well blended. Add egg yolk, almond extract and orange juice; beat well. Stir together flour, baking powder and salt; gradually add to butter mixture, beating until well blended. Stir in 3 cups coconut.

Cover; refrigerate 1 hour or until firm enough to handle. Heat oven to 350 degrees. Shape dough into 1 inc ball; roll in remaining 2 cups of coconut. Place on ungreased cookie sheet. Press down a little and with wooden spoon insert hole in center to accept filling to come later.
Bake 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove from oven to cool for a minute or so. Enlarge hole with wooden spoon or thumb. Fill hole with jam or jellies or melted chocolate.

title: Peanut Butter and Honey Oatmeal Cookies
source_file: Cookies/Peanut Butter and Honey Oatmeal Cookies.htm
steps: In a large bowl, beat peanut butter, honey and sugar with an electric mixer until creamy. Add egg white, milk, oil and vanilla; mix well. Combine oats, flour and baking soda and add to the peanut butter mixture. Mix well. Stir in raisins and peanuts. Cover and chill at least 30 minutes.

Heat over to 375 degrees. Remove refrigerated dough and drop rounded tablespoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake 7 to 9 minutes or until light golden brown. Remove to a wire rack and cool completely. Store tightly covered at room temperature or wrap airtight and freeze.
Recipe note: If using old fashioned oats, add 2 tablespoons of flour.

title: Peanut Butter Choc. Chip Cookies
steps: Blend first three ingredients, then stir in chocolate chips.
Bake at 350 degrees for 8 to 10 minutes.

title: Peanut Butter Kids Cookies
steps: Combine all ingredients except kisses. Mix at low speed until dough forms. Shape into balls (round tsp). roll into sugar. Place on ungreased cookie sheet. Bake at 375 degrees 10-12 minutes.
Take out of oven and immediately put kiss in center.

title: Poor Man's Cookies
steps: In a mixing bowl, combine oats, sugars, flour and salt. Mix well. Combine soda and hot water, stir into oat mixture along with shortening and vanilla (mixture will be crumbly). Raisins can be added here plus nuts, choc. chips, etc. Roll or squeeze into walnut size balls. Place on greased cookie sheet. Bake at 350 degrees for about 10 minutes or until golden brown. Remove to a wire rack to cool. Yield about 3-4 dozen.

title: Praline Cookies
steps: Combine first 4 ingredients stirring well. add flour and salt, stir well. Stir in pecans. Drop by tbsp on ungreased cookie sheet. Bake at 350 degrees for about 10 minutes

title: Pretty Granola Treats
steps: In a large bowl, combine the first seven ingredients and set aside. In a small sauce pan, combine butter, brown sugar and honey; cook and stir over medium heat until sugar is dissolved, Pour over the oat mixture and mix well. Fill greased miniature cups with 1 tablespoonful of mixture. Bake at 350 degrees for 12-14 minutes or until golden brown. Cool for 10 minutes; run knife around edges before removing to a wire rack to cool completely. Melt chocolate chips and stir until smooth. Dip bottoms of granola treats into chocolate. Place on waxed paper with chocolate side up; top each with a pecan half or walnut. Let stand until hardened.

title: Princess Brownies
steps: Prepare mix as directed, set aside. Combine softened cream cheese and sugar, mix well. Stir in vanilla and egg. Spread half brownie mix into greased 13 x 9 pan cover with cream cheese mixture and spoon remaining brownie batter on top. Bake at 350 degrees 35-40 minutes.

title: Snowball Fudge
steps: Blend sugar, evaporated milk and salt in a saucepan, heat to boiling, boil 5 minutes, stirring constantly, remove from heat.

Stir in half the marshmallows (about 1 1/2 cups) chocolate chips and vanilla, stir until melted and blended. Pour into buttered square pan, sprinkle nuts on top, swirl lightly into candy. Chill, then cut into squares.

title: Sour Cream Cookies
steps: Beat crisco with sugar, add eggs and beat well, add sour cream mix well.
Mix flour, soda, mace and add to egg mixture, add vanilla and mix well.
Drop by spoonful on cookie sheet, press down each cookie with wet tongs of fork. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes.

title: Sour Cream Cookies
steps: Beat with mixer the crisco, sugar and eggs until well creamed then add sour cream and mix well. Add the baking soda and mace to the flour then blend into the wet mixture when blended add the vanilla and blend a little longer.

Drop on cookie sheet by tablespoonful about 2 inches apart . . . press down each cookie with wet tines of fork. Bake a 350 degrees for about 10 minutes until light brown. Cool in pan slightly then to a rack.

title: Whoopie Pies
steps: Cream together the first 6 ingredients. Blend the dry ingredients together and combine both. Drop by small tablespoonful on an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake at 425 degrees for about 7 minutes.
Remove to rack to cool. When cool, match tops and bottoms to size and fill with filling.

title: Barbeque Sauce
steps: Cook onion until soft in hot oil. Add remaining ingredients. Simmer for 1 minutes.

title: Basic Barbecue Sauce
steps: Combine all ingredients and let stand for at least 10 minutes.

title: Creole Sauce
steps: Cook and stir onion, celery, pepper and garlic in butter for 5 min or til tender. Remove from heat and add tomato sauce, water and spices. Simmer 10-15 minutes til sauce is of consistency you want.

title: Creole Seasoning Blend
steps: Combine all ingredients; store in an airtight container. Use with seafood, chicken, beef, or vegetables.

title: Dark Chocolate Sauce
steps: Combine cocoa and sugar in medium saucepan; stir in corn syrup and oil.

Cook sauce over low heat, stirring constantly, 8 to 10 minutes or until sugar dissolves. Add butter, 1/4 cup water, and vanilla extract; cook, stirring constantly, just until butter melts. Serve warm over ice cream. (Save for other uses.)

title: Emeril's Essence
steps: Can be used to spice up almost anything.

title: Five Spice Powder Blend
steps: Combine all ingredients; store in an airtight container. Use to flavor fish or pork.

title: Ground Seasoning Blend
steps: Combine all ingredients; store in an airtight container. Use in stew, chowder, or sandwich spreads.

title: Herbs Seasoning Blend
steps: Combine all ingredients; store in an airtight container. Use in omelets and to season fish, vegetables or chicken.

title: Molasses BBQ Sauce
steps: Using an enamel or stainless steel sauce pan, combine the vinegar, ginger, mustard, Worcestershire sauce, garlic, molasses and lemon slices. Bring to a boil and reduce heat to a simmer. Cook 20 minutes. Stir in butter and cook 5 minutes more. Remove from heat and add salt and lemon juice. Allow to cool and strain before sing, Makes 4 cups.
Like so many sauces, this one gets better with age. It should keep, refrigerated, for several weeks.
The secret to good barbecuing is to add the sauce during the last few minutes of cooking, otherwise the high sugar content burns before the meat or poultry is done.

title: Cookies and Cream Fluff

ingredients.item: chocolate cream filled cookies, broken into chunks

steps: In bowl, whisk milk and pudding mix for 2 minutes or until slightly thickened. Fold in whipped topping and cookies. Spoon into dessert dishes. Top with additional cookies if desired. Refrigerate until serving.

title: Dirt Cups
steps: Suggested decorations: gummy worms and frogs, candy flowers, chopped peanuts.
Pour milk into large bowl. Add pudding mix. Beat with whisk until well blended, 1 to 2 minutes. Let stand 5 minutes.
Stir in whipped topping and half of crushed cookies.
Place 1 tablespoon crushed cookies into cups. Fill cups 3/4 full with pudding mixture. Top with remaining crushed cookies. Refrigerate 1 hour. Decorate.

title: Dogs in a Sweater
steps: Separate dough; roll each piece into a 15-inch rope. Insert sticks into hot dogs lengthwise. Starting at one end, wrap dough in a spiral around hot dog; pinch ends to seal. Place 1 inch apart on a baking sheet that has been coated with nonstick cooking spray. Bake at 350 degrees for 18-20 minutes. Serve with toppings of your choice.

title: Sand Cups
steps: Recommended decorations: miniature umbrellas, gummy sea shells, worms and sharks, candy stars, chopped peanuts.,
Pour milk into large bowl. Add pudding mix. Beat with whisk until well blended. 1 to 2 minutes. Let stand 5 minutes.
Stir in whipped topping and half of crushed cookies.
Place 1 tablespoon crushed cookies into cups. Fill cups 3/4 full with pudding mixture. Top with remaining crushed cookies. Refrigerate 1 hour. Decorate before serving.

title: Strawberry French Toast
steps: Spread cream cheese and strawberry jam on bread making sandwich.
Mix eggs, milk, salt. Dip sandwich in mixture, both sides. Fry both sides until done.

title: Bar-B-Q Beans
steps: Cook hamburg til brown or well done, drain grease, add all ingredients to pot, blend well for a few minutes, pour into casserole dish and bake at 400 degrees for 30 min.

title: Crepes
steps: To MAKE CREPE BATTER: With and electric blender mix at medium speed, beat together the egg, egg yolk, sugar, flour and 1/4 cup milk, until the mixture is well blended. Beat in the melted butter and remaining milk to form a smooth batter. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes. TO COOK CREPES: Drop spoonfuls of batter on a lightly oiled skillet or crepe pan and quickly spread batter from the center in a circular fashion, using the underside of the spoon. cook until the bottom side of crepes area golden brown. Carefully turn them over to lightly brown the other side. Remove the crepes from the pan, stacking them on a plate, place them in oven to keep warm til time to serve.

title: Molasses Baked Beans
steps: Mix all ingredients except bacon. Grease 2 quart casserole. Bake at 350 degrees for 55 minutes uncovered. Sprinkle bacon on and cook 5 minutes more.
